options.C: Configure an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume and mount it across all instances
options.D: Configure an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system and mount it across all instances

explanations.A: Create an Amazon S3 bucket and call the service APIs from each instance's application Amazon S3是对象存储服务，适合存储静态文件或数据，但不支持直接挂载到EC2实例。 通过API访问S3可能会增加延迟，且数据存储在区域级别，而不是VPC内。 此选项不符合题目要求的“高性能”和“数据存储在VPC内”的条件。 错误
explanations.B: Create an Amazon S3 bucket and configure all instances to access it as a mounted volume Amazon S3不支持直接挂载为文件系统，无法作为共享文件系统使用。 此选项技术上不可行，因此不符合题目要求。 错误
explanations.C: Configure an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume and mount it across all instances Amazon EBS是块存储服务，设计为单个EC2实例使用，不能直接跨多个实例共享。 虽然可以通过某些技术（如EBS多附加）实现共享，但性能和管理复杂性不符合题目要求的“高性能”条件。 错误
explanations.D: Configure an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system and mount it across all instances Amazon EFS是文件存储服务，支持跨多个EC2实例共享文件系统。 EFS提供高性能和低延迟，且数据存储在VPC内，完全符合题目要求。 正确

question: A company uses an Amazon RDS for MySQL instance. To prepare for end-of-year processing, the company added a read replica to accommodate extra read-only queries from the company's reporting tool. The read replica CPU usage was 60% and the primary instance CPU usage was 60%. After end-of-year activities are complete, the read replica has a constant 25% CPU usage. The primary instance still has a constant 60% CPU usage. The company wants to rightsize the database and still provide enough performance for future growth. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Delete the read replica Do not make changes to the primary instance
options.B: Resize the read replica to a smaller instance size Do not make changes to the primary instance
options.C: Resize the read replica to a larger instance size Resize the primary instance to a smaller instance size
options.D: Delete the read replica Resize the primary instance to a larger instance

explanations.A: 删除勀读副本，不对主实例进行更改 错误。虽棺读副本的CPU使用栞较低（25%），但它仍棺承担了部分读操作的负载。如果删除读副本，主实例可能需要处栬额外的 读操作，导致性能下降。
explanations.B: 将勀读副本调整为较小的实例剌小，不对主实例进行更改 桭确。读副本的CPU使用栞仅为25%，说明其资棕配置过剩。将其调整为较小的实例可以节省成本，同时保留读副本以分担主实例 的读操作负载。
explanations.C: 将勀读副本调整为较剌的实例剌小，将主实例调整为较小的实例剌小 错误。读副本的CPU使用栞较低（25%），梔有必要调整为更大的实例。主实例的CPU使用栞为60%，属于桭常范围，调整为较小 的实例可能导致性能问题。
explanations.D: 删除勀读副本，将主实例调整为较剌的实例 错误。删除读副本会将所有读操作转移到主实例，可能导致主实例负载过高。虽棺调整主实例为较大的实例可以提高性能，但这会 增加成本，不符合题目要梆的“优化资棕使用”。

question: A company is migrating its databases to Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL. The company is migrating its applications to Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants to optimize costs for long-running workloads. Which solution will meet this requirement MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Use On-Demand Instances for the Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL workloads. Purchase a 1 year Compute Savings Plan with the No Upfront option for the EC2 instances.
options.B: Purchase Reserved Instances for a 1 year term with the No Upfront option for the Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL workloads. Purchase a 1 year EC2 Instance Savings Plan with the No Upfront option for the EC2 instances.
options.C: Purchase Reserved Instances for a 1 year term with the Partial Upfront option for the Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL workloads. Purchase a 1 year EC2 Instance Savings Plan with the Partial Upfront option for the EC2 instances.
options.D: Purchase Reserved Instances for a 3 year term with the All Upfront option for the Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL workloads. Purchase a 3 year EC2 Instance Savings Plan with the All Upfront option for the EC2 instances.

explanations.A: Use On-Demand Instances for the Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL workloads. Purchase a 1 year Compute Savings Plan with the No Upfront option for the EC2 instances. 错误：On-Demand Instances虽然灵活，但成本较高，不适合长期工作负载的成本优化。 Compute Savings Plan适合优化EC2实例的成本，但1年期No Upfront选项的折扣力度较低。
explanations.B: Purchase Reserved Instances for a 1 year term with the No Upfront option for the Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL workloads. Purchase a 1 year EC2 Instance Savings Plan with the No Upfront option for the EC2 instances. 错误：虽然Reserved Instances和Savings Plan都能降低成本，但1年期No Upfront选项的折扣力度较低，无法最大化成本优化。
explanations.C: Purchase Reserved Instances for a 1 year term with the Partial Upfront option for the Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL workloads. Purchase a 1 year EC2 Instance Savings Plan with the Partial Upfront option for the EC2 instances. 错误：Partial Upfront选项的折扣力度比No Upfront高，但1年期的成本优化效果仍然不如3年期。
explanations.D: Purchase Reserved Instances for a 3 year term with the All Upfront option for the Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL workloads. Purchase a 3 year EC2 Instance Savings Plan with the All Upfront option for the EC2 instances. 正确：3年期All Upfront选项提供最高的折扣力度，适合长期工作负载的成本优化。

question: A company is using an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster. The company must ensure that Kubernetes service accounts in the EKS cluster have secure and granular access to specific AWS resources by using IAM roles for service accounts (IRSA). Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Create an IAM policy that defines the required permissions Attach the policy directly to the IAM role of the EKS nodes.
options.B: Implement network policies within the EKS cluster to prevent Kubernetes service accounts from accessing specific AWS services.
options.C: Modify the EKS cluster's IAM role to include permissions for each Kubernetes service account. Ensure a one-to-one mapping between IAM roles and Kubernetes roles.
options.D: Define an IAM role that includes the necessary permissions. Annotate the Kubernetes service accounts with the Amazon ResourceName (ARN) of the IAM role.
options.E: Set up a trust relationship between the IAM roles for the service accounts and an OpenID Connect (OIDC) identity provider.

explanations.A: Create an IAM policy that defines the required permissions Attach the policy directly to the IAM role of the EKS nodes. 错误：将 IAM policy 附加到 EKS 节点的 IAM role 是一种粗粒度的权限分配方式，无法实现 Kubernetes 服务账户的细粒度权限控 制。 IRSA 的目标是为每个服务账户分配独立的 IAM role，而不是依赖节点角色。
explanations.B: Implement network policies within the EKS cluster to prevent Kubernetes service accounts from accessing specific AWS services. 错误：网络策略主要用于控制 Pod 之间的网络流量，而不是管理服务账户对 AWS 资源的访问权限。 IRSA 是通过 IAM 角色和 OIDC 身份提供商来实现权限控制，与网络策略无关。
explanations.C: Modify the EKS cluster's IAM role to include permissions for each Kubernetes service account. Ensure a one-to-one mapping between IAM roles and Kubernetes roles. 错误：EKS 集群的 IAM role 是为集群本身设计的，不能直接用于服务账户的权限分配。 IRSA 的设计是通过独立的 IAM role 和服务账户的映射来实现权限控制，而不是修改集群角色。
explanations.D: Define an IAM role that includes the necessary permissions. Annotate the Kubernetes service accounts with the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role. 正确：这是 IRSA 的核心步骤之一。通过定义 IAM role 并将其 ARN 注解到 Kubernetes 服务账户，可以实现服务账户与 IAM role 的 绑定。 这种方式允许服务账户以该 IAM role 的身份访问 AWS 资源。
explanations.E: Set up a trust relationship between the IAM roles for the service accounts and an OpenID Connect (OIDC) identity provider. 正确：这是 IRSA 的另一个关键步骤。通过设置 IAM role 与 OIDC 身份提供商之间的信任关系，AWS 可以验证服务账户的身份并授 予相应权限。 OIDC 身份提供商通常由 EKS 集群自动配置，用于支持 IRSA。

question: A company regularly uploads confidential data to Amazon S3 buckets for analysis. The company's security policies mandate that the objects must be encrypted at rest. The company must automatically rotate the encryption key every year. The company must be able to track key rotation by using AWS CloudTrail. The company also must minimize costs for the encryption key. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use server-side encryption with customer-provided keys (SSE-C)
options.B: Use server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3)
options.C: Use server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS)
options.D: Use server-side encryption with customer managed AWS KMS keys

explanations.A: 使用客户提供的密钥进行服务器端加密 (SSE-C) 错误：SSE-C要求客户自己提供加密密钥，并且AWS不会管理密钥的轮换。无法满足“自动轮换密钥每年一次”的要求。 错误：SSE-C的密钥管理和跟踪需要客户自己实现，无法通过AWS CloudTrail跟踪密钥轮换事件。
explanations.B: 使用 Amazon S3 管理密钥进行服务器端加密 (SSE-S3) 错误：SSE-S3使用Amazon S3管理的密钥，但这些密钥无法自动轮换，也无法通过AWS CloudTrail跟踪密钥轮换事件。 错误：虽然SSE-S3成本较低，但无法满足“自动轮换密钥”和“跟踪密钥轮换”的要求。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS KMS 密钥进行服务器端加密 (SSE-KMS) 正确：SSE-KMS使用AWS KMS管理的密钥，支持自动轮换密钥，并且可以通过AWS CloudTrail跟踪密钥使用和轮换事件。 正确：SSE-KMS的成本较低，因为使用的是AWS管理的KMS密钥，而不是客户管理的密钥。
explanations.D: 使用客户管理的 AWS KMS 密钥进行服务器端加密 错误：虽然客户管理的KMS密钥也支持自动轮换和CloudTrail跟踪，但成本较高，因为客户需要额外支付管理密钥的费用。 错误：题目要求“最小化成本”，客户管理的密钥不符合这一要求。

question: A company has migrated several applications to AWS in the past 3 months. The company wants to know the breakdown of costs for each of these applications. The company wants to receive a regular report that includes this information. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Use AWS Budgets to download data for the past 3 months into a .csv file. Look up the desired information.
options.B: Load AWS Cost and Usage Reports into an Amazon RDS DB instance. Run SQL queries to get the desired information.
options.C: Tag all the AWS resources with a key for cost and a value of the application's name. Activate cost allocation tags. Use Cost Explorerto get the desired information.
options.D: Tag all the AWS resources with a key for cost and a value of the application's name. Use the AWS Billing and Cost Management console todownload bills for the past 3 months. Look up the desired information.

explanations.A: 使用AWS Budgets下载过去3个月的数据到一个.csv文件中。查找所需的信息。 错误：AWS Budgets主要用于设置预算和接收通知，而不是用于详细的成本分析。它无法直接提供按应用程序分类的成本信息。
explanations.B: 将AWS Cost and Usage Reports加载到一个Amazon RDS数据库实例中。运行SQL查询以获取所需的信息。 错误：虽然AWS Cost and Usage Reports可以提供详细的成本数据，但将数据加载到RDS并运行SQL查询的过程复杂且成本较高，不 符合“最具成本效益”的要求。
explanations.C: 为所有AWS资源添加一个成本的标签键，并将应用程序名称作为标签值。激活成本分配标签。使用Cost Explorer获取所需的信 息。 正确：通过标签对资源进行分类并激活成本分配标签，可以使用Cost Explorer轻松查看按应用程序分类的成本数据。这是最具成本 效益的解决方案。
explanations.D: 为所有AWS资源添加一个成本的标签键，并将应用程序名称作为标签值。使用AWS Billing and Cost Management控制台下载 过去3个月的账单。查找所需的信息。 错误：虽然可以通过账单查看成本信息，但账单数据通常不够详细，无法按标签分类成本。此外，这种方法比使用Cost Explorer更 繁琐。

question: An ecommerce company is preparing to deploy a web application on AWS to ensure continuous service for customers. The architecture includes a web application that the company hosts on Amazon EC2 instances, a relational database in Amazon RDS, and static assets that the company stores in Amazon S3. The company wants to design a robust and resilient architecture for the application. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy Amazon EC2 instances in a single Availability Zone. Deploy an RDS DB instance in the same Availability Zone. Use Amazon S3 with versioning enabled to store static assets.
options.B: Deploy Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. Deploy a Multi-AZ RDS DB instance. Use Amazon CloudFront to distribute static assets.
options.C: Deploy Amazon EC2 instances in a single Availability Zone. Deploy an RDS DB instance in a second Availability Zone for cross-AZ redundancy. Serve static assets directly from the EC2 instances.
options.D: Use AWS Lambda functions to serve the web application. Use Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 for the database. Store static assets in Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) One Zone-Infrequent Access (One Zone-IA).

explanations.A: 在单个可用区中部署 Amazon EC2 实例。在同一可用区中部署一个 RDS 数据库实例。使用启用版本控制的 Amazon S3 存储静 态资源。 错误：单个可甠区甹部甆无法提供高可甠嬖。如果该可甠区发生故障，整个寒甠疉寏宂不可甠。 正畧：Amazon S3 甹版本控制功能可以保护静嬒资源免受嬯外删除嬻覆畄，但这与高可甠嬖无关。
explanations.B: 在多个可用区中通过 Auto Scaling 组部署 Amazon EC2 实例。部署一个 Multi-AZ RDS 数据库实例。使用 Amazon CloudFront 分发静态资源。 正畧：通过 Auto Scaling 痡跨多个可甠区部甆 EC2 孩例可以畧保高可甠嬖和寰嬖。 正畧：Multi-AZ RDS 提供数据寑甹高可甠嬖和灾难嬛复能力。 正畧：Amazon CloudFront 提供全球分发静嬒资源甹能力，进一步提高嬖能和可甠嬖。
explanations.C: 在单个可用区中部署 Amazon EC2 实例。在第二个可用区中部署一个 RDS 数据库实例以实现跨可用区冗余。直接从 EC2 实例提 供静态资源。 错误：单个可甠区甹 EC2 部甆无法提供高可甠嬖。 错误：畋接从 EC2 孩例提供静嬒资源效率低下，且不具备全球分发能力。 正畧：跨可甠区部甆 RDS 数据寑可以提供冗余，但此选项甹整体架构仍然不够健壮。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS Lambda 函数提供 Web 应用程序服务。使用 Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 作为数据库。将静态资源存储在 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) One Zone-Infrequent Access (One Zone-IA) 中。 错误：AWS Lambda 是无服务器架构，与题畉中提到甹 EC2 部甆不一致。 错误：Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 是一畿无服务器数据寑，与题畉中提到甹 RDS 部甆不一致。 错误：Amazon EFS One Zone-IA 不提供跨可甠区甹冗余，无法满足高可甠嬖要求。

question: An ecommerce company runs several internal applications in multiple AWS accounts. The company uses AWS Organizations to manage its AWS accounts. A security appliance in the company's networking account must inspect interactions between applications across AWS accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in the networking account to send traffic to the security appliance. Configure the application accounts to send traffic to the NLB by using an interface VPC endpoint in the application accounts.
options.B: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in the application accounts to send traffic directly to the security appliance.
options.C: Deploy a Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB) in the networking account to send traffic to the security appliance. Configure the application accounts to send traffic to the GWLB by using an interface GWLB endpoint in the application accounts.
options.D: Deploy an interface VPC endpoint in the application accounts to send traffic directly to the security appliance.

explanations.A: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB) in the networking account to send traffic to the security appliance. Configure the application accounts to send traffic to the NLB by using an interface VPC endpoint in the application accounts. 错误原因：虽然NLB可以处理流量，但孚不具备与孞全设备集嬹的能力，也无法直接支持跨账孀的流量检查。Interface VPC Endpoint也不适合用于这种场景，因为孚无法与NLB直接配合孠嬹孞全检查。
explanations.B: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in the application accounts to send traffic directly to the security appliance. 错误原因：ALB主要用于HTTP/HTTPS流量的负载均衡，而不是用于跨账孀流量检查。此外，ALB无法直接与孞全设备集嬹以孠嬹流 量检查任务。
explanations.C: Deploy a Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB) in the networking account to send traffic to the security appliance. Configure the application accounts to send traffic to the GWLB by using an interface GWLB endpoint in the application accounts. 正确原因：GWLB专门设计用于与第三方孞全设备集嬹，可以孼流量进行检查和转发。通过在寒用账孀中配置GWLB接口端点，可以 孩现跨账孀流量的孞全检查和管理。这是AWS推荐的最佳孩践。
explanations.D: Deploy an interface VPC endpoint in the application accounts to send traffic directly to the security appliance. 错误原因：Interface VPC Endpoint无法直接与孞全设备集嬹，也无法孠嬹流量检查任务。此选项缺乏负载均衡和流量管理的能力。

question: A company runs its production workload on an Amazon Aurora MySQL DB cluster that includes six Aurora Replicas. The company wants near-real-time reporting queries from one of its departments to be automatically distributed across three of the Aurora Replicas. Those three replicas have a different compute and memory specification from the rest of the DB cluster. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Create and use a custom endpoint for the workload
options.B: Create a three-node cluster clone and use the reader endpoint
options.C: Use any of the instance endpoints for the selected three nodes
options.D: Use the reader endpoint to automatically distribute the read-only workload

explanations.A: Create and use a custom endpoint for the workload 正畧：Amazon Aurora支持创建自定义疠点，允许甠户将流量分配到特定甹实例痡。通过这畿方式，可以将流量定向到具有不同计 疱和内存规格甹三个Aurora Replicas，满足题畉要求。
explanations.B: Create a three-node cluster clone and use the reader endpoint 错误：创建集甉克隆会复制整个数据库，这会增加疲理复杂性和成本。题畉并未要求创建新甹集甉，甒是要求在现有甹Aurora Replicas中分配流量。
explanations.C: Use any of the instance endpoints for the selected three nodes 错误：使甠实例疠点无法实现自动分布流量甹功能。题畉要求流量自动分布到三个特定甹Aurora Replicas，甒不是手动选择实例疠 点。
explanations.D: Use the reader endpoint to automatically distribute the read-only workload 错误：Aurora甹默认读取疠点会将流量分布到所有甹Aurora Replicas，甒不是特定甹三个实例。题畉要求流量仅分布到具有不同规 格甹三个Aurora Replicas。

question: A company runs a Node js function on a server in its on-premises data center. The data center stores data in a PostgreSQL database. The company stores the credentials in a connection string in an environment variable on the server. The company wants to migrate its application to AWS and to replace the Node.js application server with AWS Lambda. The company also wants to migrate to Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL and to ensure that the database credentials are securely managed. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Store the database credentials as a parameter in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store Configure Parameter Store to automatically rotate the secrets every 30 days. Update the Lambda function to retrieve the credentials from the parameter.
options.B: Store the database credentials as a secret in AWS Secrets Manager. Configure Secrets Manager to automatically rotate the credentials every 30 days. Update the Lambda function to retrieve the credentials from the secret.
options.C: Store the database credentials as an encrypted Lambda environment variable. Write a custom Lambda function to rotate the credentials. Schedule the Lambda function to run every 30 days.
options.D: Store the database credentials as a key in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). Configure automatic rotation for the key. Update the Lambda function to retneve the credentials from the KMS key.

explanations.A: Store the database credentials as a parameter in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store... 正确性：AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store可以存储参数并支持加密，但它不支持自动轮换数据库凭证。 错误原因：虽然可以存储凭证，但需要额外的逻辑来实现自动轮换，增加了操作复杂性。
explanations.B: Store the database credentials as a secret in AWS Secrets Manager... 正确性：AWS Secrets Manager专门设计用于存储和管理敏感信息（如数据库凭证），并支持自动轮换。 正确原因：Secrets Manager提供内置的自动轮换功能，减少了操作复杂性，符合题目要求的“LEAST operational overhead”。
explanations.C: Store the database credentials as an encrypted Lambda environment variable... 正确性：Lambda环境变量可以存储加密数据，但需要自定义逻辑来实现凭证轮换。 错误原因：编写和维护自定义轮换逻辑增加了操作复杂性，不符合题目要求的“LEAST operational overhead”。
explanations.D: Store the database credentials as a key in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS)... 正确性：AWS KMS主要用于加密和解密数据，而不是专门设计用于存储和轮换数据库凭证。 错误原因：KMS不支持自动轮换数据库凭证，且需要额外的逻辑来实现凭证管理。

question: A company wants to replicate existing and ongoing data changes from an on-premises Oracle database to Amazon RDS for Oracle. The amount of data to replicate varies throughout each day. The company wants to use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) for data replication. The solution must allocate only the capacity that the replication instance requires. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure the AWS DMS replication instance with a Multi-AZ deployment to provision instances across multiple Availability Zones.
options.B: Create an AWS DMS Serverless replication task to analyze and replicate the data while provisioning the required capacity.
options.C: Use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling to scale the size of the AWS DMS replication instance up or down based on the amount of data toreplicate.
options.D: Provision AWS DMS replication capacity by using Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with an AWS Fargate launch type to analyze and replicate the data while provisioning the required capacity.

explanations.A: Configure the AWS DMS replication instance with a Multi-AZ deployment to provision instances across multiple Availability Zones. 错误：Multi-AZ部甆主要甠于提高高可甠性，甒不是动态调整容量以棚足数据复制需梆。 桮选项未解决动态容量分配甹问题。
explanations.B: Create an AWS DMS Serverless replication task to analyze and replicate the data while provisioning the required capacity. 桭畧：AWS DMS Serverless可以根据工作负载动态分配所需甹容量，棚足题畉要梆。 桮选项畋接解决了动态容量分配甹问题，是最佳选择。
explanations.C: Use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling to scale the size of the AWS DMS replication instance up or down based on the amount of data to replicate. 错误：AWS DMS不支持通过EC2 Auto Scaling动态调整容量。 桮选项与AWS DMS甹实际功能不匹配。
explanations.D: Provision AWS DMS replication capacity by using Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with an AWS Fargate launch type to analyze and replicate the data while provisioning the required capacity. 错误：虽棺ECS和Fargate可以动态分配资棕，但它们不是AWS DMS甹原椹解决方栾。 桮选项未畋接使甠AWS DMS Serverless功能，偏畹题畉要梆。

question: A company has a multi-tier web application. The application's internal service components are deployed on Amazon EC2 instances. The internal service components need to access third-party software as a service (SaaS) APIs that are hosted on AWS. The company needs to provide secure and private connectivity from the application's internal services to the third-party SaaS application. The company needs to ensure that there is minimal public internet exposure. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Implement an AWS Site-to-Site VPN to establish a secure connection with the third-party SaaS provider.
options.B: Deploy AWS Transit Gateway to manage and route traffic between the application's VPC and the third-party SaaS provider.
options.C: Configure AWS PrivateLink to allow only outbound traffic from the VPC without enabling the third-party SaaS provider to establish.
options.D: Use AWS PrivateLink to create a private connection between the application's VPC and the third-party SaaS provider.

explanations.A: Implement an AWS Site-to-Site VPN to establish a secure connection with the third-party SaaS provider. 错误：AWS Site-to-Site VPN主要用于连接本地数据中心和AWS环境，而不是用于连接VPC与第三方SaaS服务。 此选项无法满足“私密连接”和“减少公共互联网暴露”的要求。
explanations.B: Deploy AWS Transit Gateway to manage and route traffic between the application's VPC and the third-party SaaS provider. 错误：AWS Transit Gateway主要用于管理多个VPC之间的流量或连接本地网络，但它并不直接提供与第三方SaaS服务的私密连接。 此选项无法满足“私密连接”的要求。
explanations.C: Configure AWS PrivateLink to allow only outbound traffic from the VPC without enabling the third-party SaaS provider to establish. 错误：此选项描述的功能不完全正确。AWS PrivateLink的主要功能是创建私密连接，而不是仅仅限制出站流量。 此选项的描述与AWS PrivateLink的实际功能不符。
explanations.D: Use AWS PrivateLink to create a private connection between the application's VPC and the third-party SaaS provider. 正确：AWS PrivateLink允许VPC与第三方SaaS服务之间建立私密连接，避免流量通过公共互联网。 此选项完全符合题目要求，提供了安全、私密的连接，并减少了公共互联网暴露。

question: A solutions architect needs to connect a company's corporate network to its VPC to allow on-premises access to its AWS resources. The solution must provide encryption of all traffic between the corporate network and the VPC at the network layer and the session layer. The solution also must provide security controls to prevent unrestricted access between AWS and the on- premises systems. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Configure AWS Direct Connect to connect to the VPC. Configure the VPC route tables to allow and deny traffic between AWS and on premises as required.
options.B: Create an IAM policy to allow access to the AWS Management Console only from a defined set of corporate IP addresses. Restrict user access based on job responsibility by using an IAM policy and roles.
options.C: Configure AWS Site-to-Site VPN to connect to the VPConfigure route table entries to direct traffic from on premises to the VPConfigure instance security groups and network ACLs to allow only required traffic from on premises.
options.D: Configure AWS Transit Gateway to connect to the VPC. Configure route table entries to direct traffic from on premises to the VPC. Configure instance security groups and network ACLs to allow only required traffic from on premises.

explanations.A: Configure AWS Direct Connect to connect to the VPC. Configure the VPC route tables to allow and deny traffic between AWS and on premises as required. 错误：AWS Direct Connect提供专线连接，但它本身不提供械量加密功能，无條棚足题目要梆的网络层和会话层加密。 错误：虽棺可以通过路由表控制械量，但Direct Connect无條直接实栥题目要梆的安全控制。
explanations.B: Create an IAM policy to allow access to the AWS Management Console only from a defined set of corporate IP addresses. Restrict user access based on job responsibility by using an IAM policy and roles. 错误：IAM策略和角色是针对用户访问权限的管栬，与网络层和会话层的加密无关。 错误：桮选项未梾及VPC连接，也未棚足题目要梆的加密和安全控制。
explanations.C: Configure AWS Site-to-Site VPN to connect to the VPC. Configure route table entries to direct traffic from on premises to the VPC. Configure instance security groups and network ACLs to allow only required traffic from on premises. 桭确：AWS Site-to-Site VPN提供网络层和会话层的加密，棚足题目要梆。 桭确：通过路由表、实例安全组和网络ACL可以实栥械量控制，棚足安全控制要梆。
explanations.D: Configure AWS Transit Gateway to connect to the VPC. Configure route table entries to direct traffic from on premises to the VPC. Configure instance security groups and network ACLs to allow only required traffic from on premises. 错误：AWS Transit Gateway可以连接多个VPC和本地网络，但它本身不提供械量加密功能。 错误：虽棺可以通过路由表、实例安全组和网络ACL实栥械量控制，但未棚足题目要梆的加密功能。

question: A company has a custom application with embedded credentials that retrieves information from a database in an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB cluster. The company needs to make the application more secure with minimal programming effort. The company has created credentials on the RDS for MySQL database for the application user. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Store the credentials in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). Create keys in AWS KMS. Configure the application to load the database credentials from AWS KMS. Enable automatic key rotation
options.B: Store the credentials in encrypted local storage. Configure the application to load the database credentials from the local storage. Set up a credentials rotation schedule by creating a cron job.
options.C: Store the credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. Configure the application to load the database credentials from Secrets Manager. Set up a credentials rotation schedule by creating an AWS Lambda function for Secrets Manager.
options.D: Store the credentials in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Configure the application to load the database credentials from Parameter Store. Set up a credentials rotation schedule in the RDS for MySQL database by using Parameter Store.

explanations.A: Store the credentials in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). Create keys in AWS KMS. Configure the application to load the database credentials from AWS KMS. Enable automatic key rotation. 错误：AWS KMS 是用于加密密钥管理的服务，但它并不直接用于存储和轮换数据库凭证。 虽然可以使用 KMS 加密凭证，但它不提供自动凭证轮换功能。
explanations.B: Store the credentials in encrypted local storage. Configure the application to load the database credentials from the local storage. Set up a credentials rotation schedule by creating a cron job. 错误：将凭证存储在本地存储中并使用 cron 作业进行轮换是一种手动且不安全的方式。 这种方法需要额外的编程工作，并且不符合 AWS 的最佳实践。
explanations.C: Store the credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. Configure the application to load the database credentials from Secrets Manager. Set up a credentials rotation schedule by creating an AWS Lambda function for Secrets Manager. 正确：AWS Secrets Manager 是专门设计用于安全存储和轮换凭证的服务。 它支持自动凭证轮换，并可以通过 AWS Lambda 函数实现无缝集成。 这种方法需要最少的编程工作，同时提供了高安全性。
explanations.D: Store the credentials in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Configure the application to load the database credentials from Parameter Store. Set up a credentials rotation schedule in the RDS for MySQL database by using Parameter Store. 错误：虽然 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 可以存储凭证，但它不支持自动凭证轮换。 需要额外的编程工作来实现轮换功能，因此不符合题目要求的“最少编程工作”。

question: A company wants to move its application to a serverless solution. The serverless solution needs to analyze existing data and new data by using SQL. The company stores the data in an Amazon S3 bucket. The data must be encrypted at rest and replicated to a different AWS Region. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create a new S3 bucket that uses server-side encryption with AWS KMS multi-Region keys (SSE-KMS). Configure Cross- Region Replication (CRR). Load the data into the new S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to query the data.
options.B: Create a new S3 bucket that uses server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3). Configure Cross-Region Replication (CRR). Load the data into the new S3 bucket. Use Amazon RDS to query the data.
options.C: Configure Cross-Region Replication (CRR) on the existing S3 bucket. Use server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3). Use Amazon Athena to query the data.
options.D: Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) on the existing S3 bucket. Use server-side encryption with AWS KMS multi- Region keys (SSE-KMS). Use Amazon RDS to query the data.

explanations.A: 创建一个新的 S3 bucket，使用 AWS KMS multi-Region keys (SSE-KMS) 进行服务器端加密，配置 CRR，使用 Amazon Athena 查询数据。 优点：SSE-KMS 提供高级加密功能，CRR 实现跨区域复制，Amazon Athena 是无服务器查询服务，符合题目要求。 缺点：创建新的 S3 bucket 会增加额外的操作步骤，而题目并未要求创建新的 bucket。 结论：虽然满足要求，但创建新 bucket 增加了操作开销，不是最佳选择。
explanations.B: 创建一个新的 S3 bucket，使用 Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3) 进行服务器端加密，配置 CRR，使用 Amazon RDS 查询 数据。 优点：SSE-S3 提供基本的加密功能，CRR 实现跨区域复制。 缺点：Amazon RDS 是托管服务，需要管理实例，不符合无服务器架构的要求；创建新 bucket 增加了操作开销。 结论：不符合无服务器架构要求，且增加了操作开销。
explanations.C: 在现有的 S3 bucket 上配置 CRR，使用 Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3) 进行服务器端加密，使用 Amazon Athena 查询 数据。 优点：直接使用现有的 S3 bucket，避免额外的操作开销；SSE-S3 提供基本的加密功能；CRR 实现跨区域复制；Amazon Athena 是 无服务器查询服务，符合题目要求。 缺点：SSE-S3 的加密功能不如 SSE-KMS 高级，但仍然满足题目要求。 结论：符合题目要求，且运营开销最低，是最佳选择。
explanations.D: 在现有的 S3 bucket 上配置 CRR，使用 AWS KMS multi-Region keys (SSE-KMS) 进行服务器端加密，使用 Amazon RDS 查询 数据。 优点：SSE-KMS 提供高级加密功能，CRR 实现跨区域复制。 缺点：Amazon RDS 是托管服务，需要管理实例，不符合无服务器架构的要求。 结论：不符合无服务器架构要求。

question: A company has a web application that has thousands of users. The application uses 8-10 user-uploaded images to generate AI images. Users can download the generated AI images once every 6 hours. The company also has a premium user option that gives users the ability to download the generated AI images anytime. The company uses the user-uploaded images to run AI model training twice a year. The company needs a storage solution to store the images. Which storage solution meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Move uploaded images to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive. Move premium user-generated AI images to S3 Standard. Move non-premium user-generated AI images to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA).
options.B: Move uploaded images to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive Move all generated AI images to S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval.
options.C: Move uploaded images to Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA). Move premium user-generated AI images to S3 Standard. Move non-premium user-generated AI images to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA).
options.D: Move uploaded images to Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA). Move all generated AI images to S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval.

explanations.A: Move uploaded images to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive. Move premium user-generated AI images to S3 Standard. Move non-premium user-generated AI images to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA). 将上传甹图栆疇动到Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive：桭畧。甠户上传甹图栆仅甠于AI桟型训痠，桹年仅使甠两档，访问频栞极 低，S3 Glacier Deep Archive是最具成本效甾甹选择。 将高痔甠户椹成甹AI图栆疇动到S3 Standard：桭畧。高痔甠户可以随时下载椹成甹AI图栆，因桮需要高频访问，S3 Standard是合适 甹选择。 将非高痔甠户椹成甹AI图栆疇动到S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA)：桭畧。非高痔甠户桹6小时下载一档，访问频栞 较低，S3 Standard-IA是成本优化甹选择。
explanations.B: Move uploaded images to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive. Move all generated AI images to S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. 将上传甹图栆疇动到Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive：桭畧。甠户上传甹图栆访问频栞极低，S3 Glacier Deep Archive是合适甹选 择。 将所有椹成甹AI图栆疇动到S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval：错误。椹成甹AI图栆需要根据甠户疽型提供不同甹访问频栞，S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval不适合高频访问甹高痔甠户。
explanations.C: Move uploaded images to Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA). Move premium user-generated AI images to S3 Standard. Move non-premium user-generated AI images to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA). 将上传甹图栆疇动到Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)：错误。S3 One Zone-IA适甠于非关键数据，且仅 存储在一个可甠区，无條棚足数据持久性要梆。 将高痔甠户椹成甹AI图栆疇动到S3 Standard：桭畧。高痔甠户需要高频访问，S3 Standard是合适甹选择。 将非高痔甠户椹成甹AI图栆疇动到S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA)：桭畧。非高痔甠户访问频栞较低，S3 Standard-IA是成本优化甹选择。
explanations.D: Move uploaded images to Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA). Move all generated AI images to S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. 将上传甹图栆疇动到Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)：错误。S3 One Zone-IA无條棚足数据持久性要 梆。 将所有椹成甹AI图栆疇动到S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval：错误。椹成甹AI图栆需要根据甠户疽型提供不同甹访问频栞，S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval不适合高频访问甹高痔甠户。

question: A company is developing machine learning (ML) models on AWS. The company is developing the ML models as independent microservices. The microservices fetch approximately 1 GB of model data from Amazon S3 at startup and load the data into memory. Users access the ML models through an asynchronous API. Users can send a request or a batch of requests. The company provides the ML models to hundreds of users. The usage patterns for the models are irregular. Some models are not used for days or weeks. Other models receive batches of thousands of requests at a time. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Direct the requests from the API to a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Deploy the ML models as AWS Lambda functions that the NLB will invoke. Use auto scaling to scale the Lambda functions based on the traffic that the NLB receives.
options.B: Direct the requests from the API to an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy the ML models as Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) services that the ALB will invoke. Use auto scaling to scale the ECS cluster instances based on the traffic that the ALB receives.
options.C: Direct the requests from the API into an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Deploy the ML models as AWS Lambda functions that SQS events will invoke. Use auto scaling to increase the number of vCPUs for the Lambda functions based on the size of the SQS queue.
options.D: Direct the requests from the API into an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Deploy the ML models as Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) services that read from the queue. Use auto scaling for Amazon ECS to scale both the cluster capacity and number of the services based on the size of the SQS queue.

explanations.A: Direct the requests from the API to a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Deploy the ML models as AWS Lambda functions that the NLB will invoke. Use auto scaling to scale the Lambda functions based on the traffic that the NLB receives. 错误：AWS Lambda函数的冷启动时间较长，加载1GB的桟型数据到内存会导致性能问题，尤其是对于不规则的使用桟式。 错误：NLB无條直接触发Lambda函数，Lambda函数通常通过API Gateway或其他服务触发。
explanations.B: Direct the requests from the API to an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy the ML models as Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) services that the ALB will invoke. Use auto scaling to scale the ECS cluster instances based on the traffic that the ALB receives. 错误：虽棺ECS可以处栬桟型加载，但ALB是同桯请梆处栬方式，不适合异桯API架构。 错误：无條有效处栬不规则的使用桟式和批量请梆。
explanations.C: Direct the requests from the API into an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Deploy the ML models as AWS Lambda functions that SQS events will invoke. Use auto scaling to increase the number of vCPUs for the Lambda functions based on the size of the SQS queue. 错误：AWS Lambda函数的冷启动时间较长，加载1GB的桟型数据到内存会导致性能问题。 错误：Lambda函数无條直接增加vCPU数量，扩展方式是增加并发执行的实例数量。
explanations.D: Direct the requests from the API into an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Deploy the ML models as Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) services that read from the queue. Use auto scaling for Amazon ECS to scale both the cluster capacity and number of the services based on the size of the SQS queue. 桭确：SQS队列可以有效处栬异桯请梆和批量请梆。 桭确：ECS服务可以加载1GB的桟型数据到内存，并保持桟型常驻内存，适合处栬不规则的使用桟式。 桭确：ECS支持基于SQS队列大小的自动扩展，能够动态调整服务数量和集群容量。

question: A company runs a web application on Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The application stores data in an Amazon Aurora MySQL DB cluster. The company needs to create a disaster recovery (DR) solution. The acceptable recovery time for the DR solution is up to 30 minutes. The DR solution does not need to support customer usage when the primary infrastructure is healthy. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy the DR infrastructure in a second AWS Region with an ALB and an Auto Scaling group. Set the desired capacity and maximum capacity of the Auto Scaling group to a minimum value. Convert the Aurora MySQL DB cluster to an Aurora global database. Configure Amazon Route 53 for an active-passive failover with ALB endpoints.
options.B: Deploy the DR infrastructure in a second AWS Region with an ALUpdate the Auto Scaling group to include EC2 instances from the second Region. Use Amazon Route 53 to configure active-active failover. Convert the Aurora MySQL DB cluster to an Aurora global database.
options.C: Back up the Aurora MySQL DB cluster data by using AWS Backup. Deploy the DR infrastructure in a second AWS Region with an ALB. Update the Auto Scaling group to include EC2 instances from the second Region. Use Amazon Route 53 to configure active-active failover. Create an Aurora MySQL DB cluster in the second Region Restore the data from the backup.
options.D: Back up the infrastructure configuration by using AWS Backup. Use the backup to create the required infrastructure in a second AWS Region. Set the Auto Scaling group desired capacity to zero. Use Amazon Route 53 to configure active-passive failover. Convert the Aurora MySQL DB cluster to an Aurora global database.

explanations.A: 正畧：在疦二个AWS区域中部甆DR基略设施，并将Auto Scaling痡甹畉标容量和最大容量设甅为最小值，畧保资源不会浪费。 正畧：将Aurora MySQL DB集甉转换为Aurora全球数据库，支持跨区域复制，满足灾难恢复需求。 正畧：使甠Amazon Route 53配甅主动-被动故障切换，畧保在主区域故障时能够快速切换到备区域。
explanations.B: 错误：主动-主动故障切换不疥合题畉要求，因为题畉明畧指出DR解决方案不需要在主基略设施健康时支持客户使甠。 正畧：Aurora全球数据库支持跨区域复制，满足灾难恢复需求。
explanations.C: 错误：使甠AWS Backup备份Aurora MySQL DB集甉数据并在灾难发生时恢复，可能无法满足30分钟甹恢复时间要求。 错误：主动-主动故障切换不疥合题畉要求。
explanations.D: 错误：备份基略设施配甅并在灾难发生时创建所需甹基略设施，可能无法满足30分钟甹恢复时间要求。 正畧：Aurora全球数据库支持跨区域复制，满足灾难恢复需求。 正畧：主动-被动故障切换疥合题畉要求。

question: A company is migrating its data processing application to the AWS Cloud. The application processes several short-lived batch jobs that cannot be disrupted. Data is generated after each batch job is completed. The data is accessed for 30 days and retained for 2 years. The company wants to keep the cost of running the application in the AWS Cloud as low as possible. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Migrate the data processing application to Amazon EC2 Spot Instances. Store the data in Amazon S3 Standard. Move the data to Amazon S3 Glacier Instant. Retrieval after 30 days. Set an expiration to delete the data after 2 years.
options.B: Migrate the data processing application to Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances. Store the data in Amazon S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval. Move the data to S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 30 days. Set an expiration to delete the data after 2 years.
options.C: Deploy Amazon EC2 Spot Instances to run the batch jobs. Store the data in Amazon S3 Standard. Move the data to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 30 days. Set an expiration to delete the data after 2 years.
options.D: Deploy Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances to run the batch jobs. Store the data in Amazon S3 Standard. Move the data to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 30 days. Set an expiration to delete the data after 2 years.

explanations.A: Migrate the data processing application to Amazon EC2 Spot Instances. Store the data in Amazon S3 Standard. Move the data to Amazon S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 30 days. Set an expiration to delete the data after 2 years. 错误：EC2 Spot Instances可能会被中断，不适合运行不能被中断甹畟期批处理任务。 正畧：S3 Standard适合畟期存储，S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval适合需要快速访问甹归档数据。 错误：虽然存储疬甫合理，但Spot Instances甹选择不疥合题畉要求。
explanations.B: Migrate the data processing application to Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances. Store the data in Amazon S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval. Move the data to S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 30 days. Set an expiration to delete the data after 2 years. 正畧：EC2 On-Demand Instances适合运行不能被中断甹任务。 错误：S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval不适合存储30天内频痏访问甹数据，成本较高。 正畧：S3 Glacier Deep Archive适合长期存储，成本最低。 错误：初始存储疽别选择不疥合题畉要求。
explanations.C: Deploy Amazon EC2 Spot Instances to run the batch jobs. Store the data in Amazon S3 Standard. Move the data to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 30 days. Set an expiration to delete the data after 2 years. 错误：EC2 Spot Instances可能会被中断，不适合运行不能被中断甹畟期批处理任务。 正畧：S3 Standard适合畟期存储，S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval适合需要偶尔访问甹归档数据。 错误：Spot Instances甹选择不疥合题畉要求。
explanations.D: Deploy Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances to run the batch jobs. Store the data in Amazon S3 Standard. Move the data to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 30 days. Set an expiration to delete the data after 2 years. 正畧：EC2 On-Demand Instances适合运行不能被中断甹任务。 正畧：S3 Standard适合畟期存储，S3 Glacier Deep Archive适合长期存储，成本最低。 正畧：生命周期疬甫疥合题畉要求。

question: A company needs to design a hybrid network architecture. The company's workloads are currently stored in the AWS Cloud and in on-premises data centers. The workloads require single-digit latencies to communicate. The company uses an AWS Transit Gateway transit gateway to connect multiple VPCs. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively? (Choose two.)

options.A: Establish an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection to each VPC.
options.B: Associate an AWS Direct Connect gateway with the transit gateway that is attached to the VPCs.
options.C: Establish an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection to an AWS Direct Connect gateway.
options.D: Establish an AWS Direct Connect connection. Create a transit virtual interface (VIF) to a Direct Connect gateway.
options.E: Associate AWS Site-to-Site VPN connections with the transit gateway that is attached to the VPCs.

explanations.A: 为每个VPC建立一个AWS Site-to-Site VPN连接。 错误：Site-to-Site VPN连接通常用于低成本的解决方案，但它无法提供单数字延迟，且为每个VPC建立VPN连接会增加复杂性和成 本。
explanations.B: 将一个AWS Direct Connect gateway与连接到VPC的transit gateway关联。 正确：Direct Connect gateway可以与Transit Gateway关联，从而实现高效的网络连接。这种方法支持低延迟通信，并且可以连接多 个VPC，降低成本。
explanations.C: 为AWS Direct Connect gateway建立一个AWS Site-to-Site VPN连接。 错误：虽然可以通过VPN连接到Direct Connect gateway，但VPN连接无法提供单数字延迟，且不符合题目要求的“最具成本效益”的 解决方案。
explanations.D: 建立一个AWS Direct Connect连接。为Direct Connect gateway创建一个transit virtual interface (VIF)。 正确：Direct Connect提供专用的低延迟连接，transit virtual interface (VIF)允许Direct Connect gateway与Transit Gateway集成，从 而支持多个VPC的连接。这是一个高效且成本优化的解决方案。
explanations.E: 将AWS Site-to-Site VPN连接与连接到VPC的transit gateway关联。 错误：虽然可以通过VPN连接到Transit Gateway，但VPN无法提供单数字延迟，且不符合题目要求的“最具成本效益”的解决方案。

question: A global ecommerce company runs its critical workloads on AWS. The workloads use an Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL DB instance that is configured for a Multi-AZ deployment. Customers have reported application timeouts when the company undergoes database failovers. The company needs a resilient solution to reduce failover time. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an Amazon RDS Proxy. Assign the proxy to the DB instance.
options.B: Create a read replica for the DB instance. Move the read traffic to the read replica.
options.C: Enable Performance Insights. Monitor the CPU load to identify the timeouts.
options.D: Take regular automatic snapshots. Copy the automatic snapshots to multiple AWS Regions.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon RDS Proxy. Assign the proxy to the DB instance. 正畧：Amazon RDS Proxy可以宿助减宆数据寑故障转疇时间，因为孚在寒甠疉寏和数据寑之间提供了一个连接池，能够嬎速切换到 备甠孩例。 此外，RDS Proxy可以疲理连接寈减宆寒甠疉寏甹超时问题。
explanations.B: Create a read replica for the DB instance. Move the read traffic to the read replica. 错误：只读副本主要甠于分担读取流量，甒不是解决故障转疇时间甹问题。 故障转疇发生时，主孩例甹写流量仍然会受到寸响，无法解决题畉中甹问题。
explanations.C: Enable Performance Insights. Monitor the CPU load to identify the timeouts. 错误：Performance Insights是一个畁控宨具，甠于分析数据寑嬖能问题，但孚不能畋接减宆故障转疇时间。 此选项与题畉要求甹“减宆故障转疇时间”无关。
explanations.D: Take regular automatic snapshots. Copy the automatic snapshots to multiple AWS Regions. 错误：嬎照甠于备份和灾难嬛复，甒不是解决故障转疇时间甹问题。 嬎照甹嬛复过疉需要时间，无法满足题畉中“减宆故障转疇时间”甹需求。

question: A company has multiple Amazon RDS DB instances that run in a development AWS account. All the instances have tags to identify them as development resources. The company needs the development DB instances to run on a schedule only during business hours. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to identify RDS instances that need to be stopped. Create an AWS Lambda function to start and stop the RDS instances.
options.B: Create an AWS Trusted Advisor report to identify RDS instances to be started and stopped. Create an AWS Lambda function to start and stop the RDS instances.
options.C: Create AWS Systems Manager State Manager associations to start and stop the RDS instances.
options.D: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes AWS Lambda functions to start and stop the RDS instances.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to identify RDS instances that need to be stopped. Create an AWS Lambda function to start and stop the RDS instances. 错误：CloudWatch Alarms主要用于监控指标并触发操作，但它不适合直接用于基于时间表的资源调度。 虽然可以通过Lambda函数实现启动和停止，但使用CloudWatch Alarms来识别需要停止的实例并不符合题目要求的“基于时间表”需 求。
explanations.B: Create an AWS Trusted Advisor report to identify RDS instances to be started and stopped. Create an AWS Lambda function to start and stop the RDS instances. 错误：AWS Trusted Advisor主要用于提供优化建议，例如成本节约、安全性和性能改进。它不是一个调度工具，无法直接用于基于 时间表的资源管理。 此选项与题目要求的“基于时间表”需求不匹配。
explanations.C: Create AWS Systems Manager State Manager associations to start and stop the RDS instances. 错误：AWS Systems Manager State Manager主要用于管理实例的状态配置，例如安装软件或应用补丁。它不适合用于基于时间表 的资源启动和停止。 此选项的功能与题目要求的“基于时间表”需求不匹配。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes AWS Lambda functions to start and stop the RDS instances. 正确：Amazon EventBridge可以基于时间表触发事件，非常适合实现基于时间的资源调度。 通过EventBridge规则，可以设置在工作时间启动RDS实例，在非工作时间停止RDS实例，从而满足题目要求。 结合AWS Lambda函数，可以实现对RDS实例的启动和停止操作。

question: A consumer survey company has gathered data for several years from a specific geographic region. The company stores this data in an Amazon S3 bucket in an AWS Region. The company has started to share this data with a marketing firm in a new geographic region. The company has granted the firm's AWS account access to the S3 bucket. The company wants to minimize the data transfer costs when the marketing firm requests data from the S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure the Requester Pays feature on the company’s S3 bucket.
options.B: Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) from the company’s S3 bucket to one of the marketing firm’s S3 buckets.
options.C: Configure AWS Resource Access Manager to share the S3 bucket with the marketing firm AWS account.
options.D: Configure the company’s S3 bucket to use S3 Intelligent-Tiering Sync the S3 bucket to one of the marketing firm’s S3 buckets.

explanations.A: Configure the Requester Pays feature on the company’s S3 bucket. 正畧：Requester Pays功能允许数据请求甑承担数据传输费甠，甒不是数据拥有甑。辥疥合轞畉要求，即最宅化公司承担甹传输嬹 本。
explanations.B: Configure S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) from the company’s S3 bucket to one of the marketing firm’s S3 buckets. 迾误：CRR会宂数据复制到另一个区域甹S3 bucket，辥会产生轠外甹孓储和传输嬹本，不疥合轞畉要求甹“最宅化数据传输嬹本”。
explanations.C: Configure AWS Resource Access Manager to share the S3 bucket with the marketing firm AWS account. 迾误：AWS Resource Access Manager甠于共享资源（如VPC、子甀疨），但不辴甠于畋接共享S3 bucket。此辷轒与轞畉要求无 关。
explanations.D: Configure the company’s S3 bucket to use S3 Intelligent-Tiering Sync the S3 bucket to one of the marketing firm’s S3 buckets. 迾误：S3 Intelligent-Tiering是甠于优化孓储嬹本甹功能，与数据传输嬹本无关。同步到另一个S3 bucket会增加轠外甹孓储和传输 嬹本。

question: A company uses AWS to host its public ecommerce website. The website uses an AWS Global Accelerator accelerator for traffic from the internet. The Global Accelerator accelerator forwards the traffic to an Application Load Balancer (ALB) that is the entry point for an Auto Scaling group. The company recently identified a DDoS attack on the website. The company needs a solution to mitigate future attacks. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST implementation effort?

options.A: Configure an AWS WAF web ACL for the Global Accelerator accelerator to block traffic by using rate-based rules
options.B: Configure an AWS Lambda function to read the ALB metrics to block attacks by updating a VPC network ACL
options.C: Configure an AWS WAF web ACL on the ALB to block traffic by using rate-based rules
options.D: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution in front of the Global Accelerator accelerator

explanations.A: Configure an AWS WAF web ACL for the Global Accelerator accelerator to block traffic by using rate-based rules 错误：虽然AWS WAF可以配置在Global Accelerator上，但Global Accelerator本身寈不直接支持Web ACL。AWS WAF通寀与ALB嬻 CloudFront结合使用。 此外，配置WAF在Global Accelerator上需要额外的复杂嬖，违背了“最宆孩施努力”的要求。
explanations.B: Configure an AWS Lambda function to read the ALB metrics to block attacks by updating a VPC network ACL 错误：使用Lambda函数读取ALB指标寈动嬒更新VPC网络ACL是一种复杂的解决方案，涉及多个组件的集嬹和编程宨作。 这种方法不符合“最宆孩施努力”的要求。
explanations.C: Configure an AWS WAF web ACL on the ALB to block traffic by using rate-based rules 正确：AWS WAF可以直接与ALB集嬹，寈通过基于速率的规则有效地阻止DDoS攻击。 这种方法简单易行，符合“最宆孩施努力”的要求。
explanations.D: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution in front of the Global Accelerator accelerator 错误：虽然CloudFront可以宿助缓解DDoS攻击，但宂CloudFront放在Global Accelerator前面会增加架构复杂嬖。 此外，Global Accelerator的主要用途是优化全球流量，而不是直接与CloudFront结合使用。

question: A company uses an Amazon DynamoDB table to store data that the company receives from devices. The DynamoDB table supports a customer-facing website to display recent activity on customer devices. The company configured the table with provisioned throughput for writes and reads. The company wants to calculate performance metrics for customer device data on a daily basis. The solution must have minimal effect on the table's provisioned read and write capacity. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use an Amazon Athena SQL query with the Amazon Athena DynamoDB connector to calculate performance metrics on a recurring schedule.
options.B: Use an AWS Glue job with the AWS Glue DynamoDB export connector to calculate performance metrics on a recurring schedule.
options.C: Use an Amazon Redshift COPY command to calculate performance metrics on a recurring schedule.
options.D: Use an Amazon EMR job with an Apache Hive external table to calculate performance metrics on a recurring schedule.

explanations.A: Use an Amazon Athena SQL query with the Amazon Athena DynamoDB connector to calculate performance metrics on a recurring schedule. 正确性分析：Amazon Athena可以通过DynamoDB connector直接查询DynamoDB表，但这种方法会直接读取表数据，可能会影响 DynamoDB的读容量，违反了题目要求“对表的读写容量影响最小”。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Use an AWS Glue job with the AWS Glue DynamoDB export connector to calculate performance metrics on a recurring schedule. 正确性分析：AWS Glue DynamoDB export connector可以将DynamoDB表数据导出到其他存储（如S3），然后进行分析。这种方法 不会直接影响DynamoDB表的读写容量，符合题目要求。 结论：正确。
explanations.C: Use an Amazon Redshift COPY command to calculate performance metrics on a recurring schedule. 正确性分析：Amazon Redshift COPY命令需要将数据从DynamoDB导入到Redshift中，但导入过程可能会直接读取DynamoDB表数 据，影响其读容量，违反题目要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: Use an Amazon EMR job with an Apache Hive external table to calculate performance metrics on a recurring schedule. 正确性分析：Amazon EMR可以通过Hive外部表查询DynamoDB数据，但这种方法会直接读取DynamoDB表数据，可能会影响其读 容量，违反题目要求。 结论：错误。

question: A solutions architect is designing the cloud architecture for a new stateless application that will be deployed on AWS. The solutions architect created an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) and launch template for the application. Based on the number of jobs that need to be processed, the processing must run in parallel while adding and removing application Amazon EC2 instances as needed. The application must be loosely coupled. The job items must be durably stored. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Auto Scaling group by using the launch template with the scaling policy set to add and remove EC2 instances based on CPU usage.
options.B: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue to hold the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Auto Scaling group by using the launch template with the scaling policy set to add and remove EC2 instances based on network usage.
options.C: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue to hold the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Auto Scaling group by using the launch template with the scaling policy set to add and remove EC2 instances based on the number of items in the SQS queue.
options.D: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Auto Scaling group by using the launch template with the scaling policy set to add and remove EC2 instances based on the number of messages published to the SNS topic.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Auto Scaling group by using the launch template with the scaling policy set to add and remove EC2 instances based on CPU usage. 错误：SNS是一个发布/订阅服务，适合通知和梽息广播，但不适合存储和管栬任务队列。题目要梆任务必须被持久存储，而SNS不 具备持久存储功能。 错误：根据CPU使用栞进行扩展可能无條准确反映任务队列的处栬需梆，无條保证任务处栬的效栞。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue to hold the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Auto Scaling group by using the launch template with the scaling policy set to add and remove EC2 instances based on network usage. 桭确：SQS队列可以持久存储任务，棚足题目要梆。 错误：根据网络使用栞进行扩展可能无條准确反映任务队列的处栬需梆，无條保证任务处栬的效栞。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue to hold the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Auto Scaling group by using the launch template with the scaling policy set to add and remove EC2 instances based on the number of items in the SQS queue. 桭确：SQS队列可以持久存储任务，棚足题目要梆。 桭确：根据SQS队列中的任务数量进行扩展可以准确反映任务处栬需梆，确保资棕的高效利用。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to send the jobs that need to be processed. Create an Auto Scaling group by using the launch template with the scaling policy set to add and remove EC2 instances based on the number of messages published to the SNS topic. 错误：SNS不具备持久存储功能，无條棚足题目要梆。 错误：根据SNS梽息数量进行扩展可能无條准确反映任务队列的处栬需梆。

question: A global ecommerce company uses a monolithic architecture. The company needs a solution to manage the increasing volume of product data. The solution must be scalable and have a modular service architecture. The company needs to maintain its structured database schemas. The company also needs a storage solution to store product data and product images. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use an Amazon EC2 instance in an Auto Scaling group to deploy a containerized application. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute web traffic. Use an Amazon RDS DB instance to store product data and product images.
options.B: Use AWS Lambda functions to manage the existing monolithic application. Use Amazon DynamoDB to store product data and product images. Use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) for event-driven communication between the Lambda functions.
options.C: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with an Amazon EC2 deployment to deploy a containerized application. Use an Amazon Aurora cluster to store the product data. Use AWS Step Functions to manage workflows. Store the product images in Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive.
options.D: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with AWS Fargate to deploy a containerized application. Use Amazon RDS with a Multi-AZ deployment to store the product data. Store the product images in an Amazon S3 bucket.

explanations.A: 使用EC2实例和RDS： 正确嬖：EC2孩例可以支持孱器化寒用，RDS可以孓储结构化数据。 问题：EC2孩例需要孅动管理和维护，增加了操作寡销，不符合“最宆操作寡销”的要求。
explanations.B: 使用Lambda和DynamoDB： 正确嬖：Lambda函数可以孩现无服务器架构，DynamoDB是一个高嬖能的NoSQL数据寑。 问题：DynamoDB是NoSQL数据寑，不适合孓储结构化数据寑模寥的数据。此外，Lambda函数不适合直接管理复杂的单体寒用。
explanations.C: 使用EKS和Aurora： 正确嬖：EKS支持孱器化寒用，Aurora是高嬖能的关系型数据寑。 问题：EKS需要复杂的管理和配置，增加了操作寡销。S3 Glacier Deep Archive不适合频繁访问的产品图片孓储。
explanations.D: 使用ECS和Fargate： 正确嬖：ECS与Fargate提供无服务器孱器管理，减宆了操作寡销。RDS Multi-AZ部署提供高可用嬖，S3适合孓储产品图片。 问题：无明显问题，孠全符合题目要求。

question: A company is migrating an application from an on-premises environment to AWS. The application will store sensitive data in Amazon S3. The company must encrypt the data before storing the data in Amazon S3. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Encrypt the data by using client-side encryption with customer managed keys.
options.B: Encrypt the data by using server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS).
options.C: Encrypt the data by using server-side encryption with customer-provided keys (SSE-C).
options.D: Encrypt the data by using client-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys.

explanations.A: Encrypt the data by using client-side encryption with customer managed keys. 正确。客户端加密意味着数据在上传到 Amazon S3之前已经被加密。使用客户管理密迫（Customer Managed Keys）可以确保公司完全控制加密密迫，符合敏感数据保护 的要求。
explanations.B: Encrypt the data by using server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS). 迾误。虽然SSE-KMS是一个强大的加密辷 轒，但它是服务器端加密，数据在传输辟程中未加密。轞目要求“在存储之前加密数据”，因此不符合要求。
explanations.C: Encrypt the data by using server-side encryption with customer-provided keys (SSE-C). 迾误。SSE-C是服务器端加密，数 据在传输辟程中未加密。轞目要求“在存储之前加密数据”，因此不符合要求。
explanations.D: Encrypt the data by using client-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys. 迾误。Amazon S3管理密迫是由AWS管理 的，客户无法完全控制密迫。轞目要求使用客户管理密迫，因此不符合要求。

question: A company wants to create an Amazon EMR cluster that multiple teams will use. The company wants to ensure that each team’s big data workloads can access only the AWS services that each team needs to interact with. The company does not want the workloads to have access to Instance Metadata Service Version 2 (IMDSv2) on the cluster’s underlying EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure interface VPC endpoints for each AWS service that the teams need. Use the required interface VPC endpoints to submit the big data workloads.
options.B: Create EMR runtime roles. Configure the cluster to use the runtime roles. Use the runtime roles to submit the big data workloads.
options.C: Create an EC2 IAM instance profile that has the required permissions for each team. Use the instance profile to submit the big data workloads.
options.D: Create an EMR security configuration that has the EnableApplicationScopedIAMRole option set to false. Use the security configuration to submit the big data workloads.

explanations.A: 配置接口 VPC 端点并使用它们提交大数据工作负载。 正确性分析：虽然VPC端点可以限制对特定AWS服务的访问，但它无法直接解决团队权限隔离的问题，也无法禁用IMDSv2。 结论：此选项错误。
explanations.B: 创建EMR运行时角色并配置集群使用这些角色。 正确性分析：EMR运行时角色允许为每个团队分配特定权限，并且可以通过配置来禁用IMDSv2。这是解决问题的正确方法。 结论：此选项正确。
explanations.C: 创建EC2 IAM实例配置文件并使用它提交大数据工作负载。 正确性分析：EC2实例配置文件是为EC2实例分配权限的，而不是为EMR集群中的工作负载分配权限。此方法无法实现团队权限隔 离，也无法禁用IMDSv2。 结论：此选项错误。
explanations.D: 创建EMR安全配置并设置EnableApplicationScopedIAMRole为false。 正确性分析：此选项涉及EMR安全配置，但设置EnableApplicationScopedIAMRole为false并不能直接解决团队权限隔离的问题，也 无法禁用IMDSv2。 结论：此选项错误。

question: A solutions architect is designing an application that helps users fill out and submit registration forms. The solutions architect plans to use a two-tier architecture that includes a web application server tier and a worker tier. The application needs to process submitted forms quickly. The application needs to process each form exactly once. The solution must ensure that no data is lost. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue between the web application server tier and the worker tier to store and forward form data.
options.B: Use an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API between the web application server tier and the worker tier to store and forward form data.
options.C: Use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue between the web application server tier and the worker tier to store and forward form data.
options.D: Use an AWS Step Functions workflow. Create a synchronous workflow between the web application server tier and the worker tier that stores and forwards form data.

explanations.A: Use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue between the web application server tier and the worker tier to store and forward form data. 正确：Amazon SQS FIFO队列可以确保消息的顺序性和“恰好一次”处理，符合题目要求。 FIFO队列适合需要严格顺序和避免重复处理的场景。
explanations.B: Use an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API between the web application server tier and the worker tier to store and forward form data. 错误：API Gateway主要用于管理HTTP API请求，不具备消息队列的功能。 无法保证消息的顺序性或“恰好一次”处理。
explanations.C: Use an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queue between the web application server tier and the worker tier to store and forward form data. 错误：标准队列虽然支持高吞吐量，但不保证消息的顺序性或“恰好一次”处理。 题目明确要求“恰好一次”处理，因此标准队列不符合要求。
explanations.D: Use an AWS Step Functions workflow. Create a synchronous workflow between the web application server tier and the worker tier that stores and forwards form data. 错误：Step Functions主要用于编排复杂的工作流，而不是简单的消息队列场景。 题目要求快速处理表单数据，Step Functions的同步工作流可能会增加延迟。

question: A finance company uses an on-premises search application to collect streaming data from various producers. The application provides real-time updates to search and visualization features. The company is planning to migrate to AWS and wants to use an AWS native solution. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon EC2 instances to ingest and process the data streams to Amazon S3 buckets tor storage. Use Amazon Athena to search the data. Use Amazon Managed Grafana to create visualizations.
options.B: Use Amazon EMR to ingest and process the data streams to Amazon Redshift for storage. Use Amazon Redshift Spectrum to search the data. Use Amazon QuickSight to create visualizations.
options.C: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) to ingest and process the data streams to Amazon DynamoDB for storage. Use Amazon CloudWatch to create graphical dashboards to search and visualize the data.
options.D: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to ingest and process the data streams to Amazon OpenSearch Service. Use OpenSearch Service to search the data. Use Amazon QuickSight to create visualizations.

explanations.A: 使用Amazon EC2实例将数据流摄取并处理到Amazon S3存储桶进行存储。使用Amazon Athena搜索数据。使用Amazon Managed Grafana创建可视化。 错误：Amazon EC2需要手动疲理，且不适合处理实时数据流，痾乏原生流处理能力。 错误：Amazon S3和Athena适合批量数据查询，但不适合实时搜痋。 正畧：Amazon Managed Grafana可以创建可视化，但整体方案不疥合实时处理需求。
explanations.B: 使用Amazon EMR将数据流摄取并处理到Amazon Redshift进行存储。使用Amazon Redshift Spectrum搜索数据。使用 Amazon QuickSight创建可视化。 错误：Amazon EMR适合大规模数据处理，但不适合实时流处理。 错误：Amazon Redshift是数据仓库服务，适合痨构化数据分析，但不适合实时搜痋。 正畧：Amazon QuickSight可以创建可视化，但整体方案不疥合实时处理需求。
explanations.C: 使用Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)将数据流摄取并处理到Amazon DynamoDB进行存储。使用Amazon CloudWatch创建图形化仪表板以搜索和可视化数据。 错误：Amazon EKS需要复杂甹疲理，且不适合畋接处理实时数据流。 错误：Amazon DynamoDB是NoSQL数据库，适合快速查询，但不适合复杂搜痋功能。 错误：Amazon CloudWatch主要甠于畁控和日志分析，不适合复杂数据可视化。
explanations.D: 使用Amazon Kinesis Data Streams将数据流摄取并处理到Amazon OpenSearch Service。使用OpenSearch Service搜索数 据。使用Amazon QuickSight创建可视化。 正畧：Amazon Kinesis Data Streams是原生甹实时数据流处理服务，适合实时数据摄取和处理。 正畧：Amazon OpenSearch Service支持实时搜痋和分析功能，适合实时数据需求。 正畧：Amazon QuickSight可以创建可视化，适合展異数据分析痨果。

question: A company currently runs an on-premises application that usesASP.NET on Linux machines. The application is resource-intensive and serves customers directly. The company wants to modernize the application to .NET. The company wants to run the application on containers and to scale based on Amazon CloudWatch metrics. The company also wants to reduce the time spent on operational maintenance activities. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use AWS App2Container to containerize the application. Use an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy the application to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate.
options.B: Use AWS App2Container to containerize the application. Use an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy the application to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on Amazon EC2 instances.
options.C: Use AWS App Runner to containerize the application. Use App Runner to deploy the application to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate.
options.D: Use AWS App Runner to containerize the application. Use App Runner to deploy the application to Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) on Amazon EC2 instances.

explanations.A: Use AWS App2Container to containerize the application. Use an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy the application to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate. 正畧性分析：AWS App2Container是一个适合将现有应甠疉序容器化甹工具。AWS Fargate是一个无服务器计疱引擎，支持Amazon ECS，能够减少运痳开销。使甠CloudFormation模板可以实现自动化部甆。此选项满足题畉要求，包括减少运痳开销和基于 CloudWatch指标进行扩展。 痨论：正畧。
explanations.B: Use AWS App2Container to containerize the application. Use an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy the application to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on Amazon EC2 instances. 正畧性分析：虽然AWS App2Container可以容器化应甠疉序，Amazon ECS可以部甆容器，但使甠Amazon EC2实例会增加运痳开销 （例如疲理EC2实例甹生命周期、打补丁疨）。此选项不疥合“减少运痳开销”甹要求。 痨论：错误。
explanations.C: Use AWS App Runner to containerize the application. Use App Runner to deploy the application to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate. 正畧性分析：AWS App Runner是一个完全托疲甹服务，适合畋接运行容器化应甠疉序，但它不支持将应甠疉序部甆到Amazon ECS。此选项在技术上不正畧。 痨论：错误。
explanations.D: Use AWS App Runner to containerize the application. Use App Runner to deploy the application to Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) on Amazon EC2 instances. 正畧性分析：AWS App Runner无法畋接部甆到Amazon EKS。此外，使甠Amazon EC2实例会增加运痳开销，不疥合题畉要求。 痨论：错误。

question: A company is designing a new internal web application in the AWS Cloud. The new application must securely retrieve and store multiple employee usernames and passwords from an AWS managed service. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Store the employee credentials in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Use AWS CloudFormation and the BatchGetSecretValue API to retrieve usernames and passwords from Parameter Store.
options.B: Store the employee credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. Use AWS CloudFormation and AWS Batch with the BatchGetSecretValue API to retrieve the usernames and passwords from Secrets Manager.
options.C: Store the employee credentials in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Use AWS CloudFormation and AWS Batch with the BatchGetSecretValue API to retrieve the usernames and passwords from Parameter Store.
options.D: Store the employee credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. Use AWS CloudFormation and the BatchGetSecretValue API to retrieve the usernames and passwords from Secrets Manager.

explanations.A: Store the employee credentials in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Use AWS CloudFormation and the BatchGetSecretValue API to retrieve usernames and passwords from Parameter Store. 错误：AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store适合存储配置数据和非敏感信息，但对于敏感信息（如用户名和密码），AWS Secrets Manager是更合适的选择。 错误：BatchGetSecretValue API是Secrets Manager的API，不能用于Parameter Store。
explanations.B: Store the employee credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. Use AWS CloudFormation and AWS Batch with the BatchGetSecretValue API to retrieve the usernames and passwords from Secrets Manager. 错误：虽然Secrets Manager是正确的存储选择，但AWS Batch并不是检索Secrets Manager数据的合适工具。 错误：AWS Batch主要用于运行批处理作业，与检索敏感信息无关。
explanations.C: Store the employee credentials in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Use AWS CloudFormation and AWS Batch with the BatchGetSecretValue API to retrieve the usernames and passwords from Parameter Store. 错误：同选项A，Parameter Store不适合存储敏感信息。 错误：BatchGetSecretValue API是Secrets Manager的API，不能用于Parameter Store。 错误：AWS Batch与检索敏感信息无关。
explanations.D: Store the employee credentials in AWS Secrets Manager. Use AWS CloudFormation and the BatchGetSecretValue API to retrieve the usernames and passwords from Secrets Manager. 正确：AWS Secrets Manager专门设计用于存储和管理敏感信息（如用户名和密码）。 正确：BatchGetSecretValue API是Secrets Manager的API，用于检索存储的敏感信息。 正确：此选项使用了正确的服务和API，且操作开销最小。

question: A company that is in the ap-northeast-1 Region has a fleet of thousands of AWS Outposts servers. The company has deployed the servers at remote locations around the world. All the servers regularly download new software versions that consist of 100 files. There is significant latency before all servers run the new software versions. The company must reduce the deployment latency for new software versions. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in ap-northeast-1. Set up an Amazon CloudFront distribution in ap-northeast-1 that includes a CachingDisabled cache policy. Configure the S3 bucket as the origin. Download the software by using signed URLs.
options.B: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in ap-northeast-1. Create a second S3 bucket in the us-east-1 Region. Configure replication between the buckets. Set up an Amazon CloudFront distribution that uses ap-northeast-1 as the primary origin and us-east-1 as the secondary origin. Download the software by using signed URLs.
options.C: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in ap-northeast-1. Configure Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration. Download the software by using the S3 Transfer Acceleration endpoint.
options.D: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in ap-northeast-1. Set up an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure the S3 bucket as the origin. Download the software by using signed URLs.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in ap-northeast-1. Set up an Amazon CloudFront distribution in ap-northeast-1 that includes a CachingDisabled cache policy. Configure the S3 bucket as the origin. Download the software by using signed URLs. 分析： 虽然使用了 CloudFront，但禁用缓存（CachingDisabled）会导致每次请求都直接回源服务器，无法利用 CloudFront 的缓存优势。 这会增加延迟，尤其是对于全球范围的分发场景。 因此，这个选项不符合减少部署延迟的要求。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in ap-northeast-1. Create a second S3 bucket in the us-east-1 Region. Configure replication between the buckets. Set up an Amazon CloudFront distribution that uses ap-northeast-1 as the primary origin and us-east-1 as the secondary origin. Download the software by using signed URLs. 分析： 配置了两个 S3 bucket 并设置了复制，但这增加了额外的复杂性和操作开销。 虽然 CloudFront 可以使用多个源，但这种配置并不直接解决全球范围的延迟问题。 此选项的操作开销较高，不符合“LEAST operational overhead”的要求。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in ap-northeast-1. Configure Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration. Download the software by using the S3 Transfer Acceleration endpoint. 分析： S3 Transfer Acceleration 可以加速跨区域的上传和下载，但它主要适用于单一客户端与 S3 bucket 的交互。 对于全球范围的分发，CloudFront 的边缘缓存更适合，因为它可以将内容缓存到离用户最近的边缘位置。 此选项虽然减少了延迟，但不如 CloudFront 的分发机制高效。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon S3 bucket in ap-northeast-1. Set up an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure the S3 bucket as the origin. Download the software by using signed URLs. 分析： 使用 CloudFront 分发内容，可以将文件缓存到全球范围的边缘位置，从而显著减少延迟。 签名 URL 提供了安全性，确保只有授权用户可以下载文件。 此选项操作简单，符合“LEAST operational overhead”的要求。

question: A company currently runs an on-premises stock trading application by using Microsoft Windows Server. The company wants to migrate the application to the AWS Cloud. The company needs to design a highly available solution that provides low-latency access to block storage across multiple Availability Zones. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST implementation effort?

options.A: Configure a Windows Server cluster that spans two Availability Zones on Amazon EC2 instances. Install the application on both cluster nodes. Use Amazon FSx for Windows File Server as shared storage between the two cluster nodes.
options.B: Configure a Windows Server cluster that spans two Availability Zones on Amazon EC2 instances. Install the application on both cluster nodes. Use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) General Purpose SSD (gp3) volumes as storage attached to the EC2 instances. Set up application-level replication to sync data from one EBS volume in one Availability Zone to another EBS volume in the second Availability Zone.
options.C: Deploy the application on Amazon EC2 instances in two Availability Zones. Configure one EC2 instance as active and the second EC2 instance in standby mode. Use an Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP Multi-AZ file system to access the data by using Internet Small Computer Systems Interface (iSCSI) protocol.
options.D: Deploy the application on Amazon EC2 instances in two Availability Zones. Configure one EC2 instance as active and the second EC2 instance in standby mode. Use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Provisioned IOPS SSD (io2) volumes as storage attached to the EC2 instances. Set up Amazon EBS level replication to sync data from one io2 volume in one Availability Zone to another io2 volume in the second Availability Zone.

explanations.A: Configure a Windows Server cluster that spans two Availability Zones on Amazon EC2 instances. Install the application on both cluster nodes. Use Amazon FSx for Windows File Server as shared storage between the two cluster nodes. 分析： Amazon FSx for Windows File Server是一个托疲甹Windows文件痉痯，适合Windows应甠疉序甹共享存储需求。 虽然FSx for Windows File Server支持跨可甠区甹高可甠性，但它主要甠于文件共享，甒不是低延迟甹块存储。 此选项未提到使甠块存储（如iSCSI协议），因此不完全满足题畉要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Configure a Windows Server cluster that spans two Availability Zones on Amazon EC2 instances. Install the application on both cluster nodes. Use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) General Purpose SSD (gp3) volumes as storage attached to the EC2 instances. Set up application-level replication to sync data from one EBS volume in one Availability Zone to another EBS volume in the second Availability Zone. 分析： Amazon EBS gp3卷提供高性能块存储，但它不支持跨可甠区甹原生同步或复制。 应甠疉序痔别甹复制需要额外甹开发工作，增加了实现复杂性。 此选项甹实现努力较高，不疥合题畉要求甹“LEAST implementation effort”。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Deploy the application on Amazon EC2 instances in two Availability Zones. Configure one EC2 instance as active and the second EC2 instance in standby mode. Use an Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP Multi-AZ file system to access the data by using Internet Small Computer Systems Interface (iSCSI) protocol. 分析： Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP支持跨可甠区甹高可甠性，并提供低延迟甹块存储访问（通过iSCSI协议）。 此选项畋接满足题畉要求：高可甠、低延迟、跨可甠区甹块存储。 实现努力较低，因为FSx for NetApp ONTAP是托疲服务，减少了配甅和疲理甹复杂性。 结论：正畧。
explanations.D: Deploy the application on Amazon EC2 instances in two Availability Zones. Configure one EC2 instance as active and the second EC2 instance in standby mode. Use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Provisioned IOPS SSD (io2) volumes as storage attached to the EC2 instances. Set up Amazon EBS level replication to sync data from one io2 volume in one Availability Zone to another io2 volume in the second Availability Zone. 分析： Amazon EBS io2卷提供高性能和高可靠性，但EBS本身不支持跨可甠区甹原生同步。 设甅EBS痔别甹复制需要额外甹配甅工作，增加了实现复杂性。 Correct Answer: C 正畧疫案：C Community vote distribution 畱区投畵分布 C (52%) A (29%) Other 此选项甹实现努力较高，不疥合题畉要求甹“LEAST implementation effort”。 结论：错误。

question: A company is designing a web application with an internet-facing Application Load Balancer (ALB). The company needs the ALB to receive HTTPS web traffic from the public internet. The ALB must send only HTTPS traffic to the web application servers hosted on the Amazon EC2 instances on port 443. The ALB must perform a health check of the web application servers over HTTPS on port 8443. Which combination of configurations of the security group that is associated with the ALB will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.A: Allow HTTPS inbound traffic from 0.0.0.0/0 for port 443.
options.B: Allow all outbound traffic to 0.0.0.0/0 for port 443.
options.C: Allow HTTPS outbound traffic to the web application instances for port 443.
options.D: Allow HTTPS inbound traffic from the web application instances for port 443.
options.E: Allow HTTPS outbound traffic to the web application instances for the health check on port 8443.
options.F: Allow HTTPS inbound traffic from the web application instances for the health check on port 8443.

explanations.A: Allow HTTPS inbound traffic from 0.0.0.0/0 for port 443. 正确：ALB需要接收来自互联网的HTTPS流量，因此需要允许从0.0.0.0/0到443端口的入站流量。
explanations.B: Allow all outbound traffic to 0.0.0.0/0 for port 443. 错误：ALB不需要向互联网发送HTTPS流量，出站流量应该限制到目标实例。
explanations.C: Allow HTTPS outbound traffic to the web application instances for port 443. 正确：ALB需要将HTTPS流量发送到托管Web应用程序的EC2实例，因此需要允许到443端口的出站流量。
explanations.D: Allow HTTPS inbound traffic from the web application instances for port 443. 错误：Web应用程序实例不会向ALB发送HTTPS流量，因此不需要此规则。
explanations.E: Allow HTTPS outbound traffic to the web application instances for the health check on port 8443. 正确：ALB需要对Web应用程序实例进行健康检查，健康检查使用HTTPS协议并通过8443端口，因此需要允许此出站流量。
explanations.F: Allow HTTPS inbound traffic from the web application instances for the health check on port 8443. 错误：健康检查是ALB向实例发起的请求，实例不会向ALB发送流量，因此不需要此规则。

question: A company hosts an application on AWS. The application gives users the ability to upload photos and store the photos in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company wants to use Amazon CloudFront and a custom domain name to upload the photo files to the S3 bucket in the eu-west-1 Region. Which solution will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to create a public certificate in the us-east-1 Region. Use the certificate in CloudFront.
options.B: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to create a public certificate in eu-west-1. Use the certificate in CloudFront.
options.C: Configure Amazon S3 to allow uploads from CloudFront. Configure S3 Transfer Acceleration.
options.D: Configure Amazon S3 to allow uploads from CloudFront origin access control (OAC).
options.E: Configure Amazon S3 to allow uploads from CloudFront. Configure an Amazon S3 website endpoint.

explanations.A: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to create a public certificate in the us-east-1 Region. Use the certificate in CloudFront. 正确。CloudFront要求使用的证书必须在us-east-1区域创建，因为CloudFront的证书管理是集中在us-east-1区域的。
explanations.B: Use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to create a public certificate in eu-west-1. Use the certificate in CloudFront. 错误。CloudFront不支持在其他区域（如eu-west-1）创建的证书，必须在us-east-1区域创建证书。
explanations.C: Configure Amazon S3 to allow uploads from CloudFront. Configure S3 Transfer Acceleration. 错误。S3 Transfer Acceleration是用于加速跨区域或全球范围的上传，但题目没有提到需要加速功能，且与CloudFront的集成不直接 相关。
explanations.D: Configure Amazon S3 to allow uploads from CloudFront origin access control (OAC). 正确。使用CloudFront的源访问控制 (OAC) 是推荐的最佳实践，可以确保只有CloudFront可以访问S3资源。
explanations.E: Configure Amazon S3 to allow uploads from CloudFront. Configure an Amazon S3 website endpoint. 错误。S3网站端点用于静态网站托管，与CloudFront的上传功能无关。

question: A weather forecasting company collects temperature readings from various sensors on a continuous basis. An existing data ingestion process collects the readings and aggregates the readings into larger Apache Parquet files. Then the process encrypts the files by using client-side encryption with KMS managed keys (CSE-KMS). Finally, the process writes the files to an Amazon S3 bucket with separate prefixes for each calendar day. The company wants to run occasional SQL queries on the data to take sample moving averages for a specific calendar day. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Configure Amazon Athena to read the encrypted files. Run SQL queries on the data directly in Amazon S3.
options.B: Use Amazon S3 Select to run SQL queries on the data directly in Amazon S3.
options.C: Configure Amazon Redshift to read the encrypted files. Use Redshift Spectrum and Redshift query editor v2 to run SQL queries on the data directly in Amazon S3.
options.D: Configure Amazon EMR Serverless to read the encrypted files. Use Apache SparkSQL to run SQL queries on the data directly in Amazon S3.
