Mount the EFS file system in all EC2 instances of the application tier. Restrict the access to the file on the file system so that the application can read the file and that only super users can modify the file. Implement an AWS Lambda function that rotates the key in Aurora every 14 days and writes new credentials into the file. 分析： 使用EFS存储凭证文件并加密虽然可行，但需要额外的配置来挂载文件系统。 需要实现一个AWS Lambda函数来轮换凭证，增加了操作复杂性。 此方法不如Secrets Manager直接集成Aurora数据库方便，且操作复杂性较高。 结论： 错误。
explanations.D: Store a file that contains the credentials in an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) encrypted Amazon S3 bucket that the application uses to load the credentials. Download the file to the application regularly to ensure that the correct credentials are used. Implement an AWS Lambda function that rotates the Aurora credentials every 14 days and uploads Correct Answer: A 正确答案：A Community vote distribution 社区投票分布 A (100%) these credentials to the file in the S3 bucket. 分析： 使用S3存储凭证文件并加密虽然可行，但需要额外的配置来定期下载文件。 需要实现一个AWS Lambda函数来轮换凭证，增加了操作复杂性。 此方法不如Secrets Manager直接集成Aurora数据库方便，且操作复杂性较高。 结论： 错误。

question: A streaming media company is rebuilding its infrastructure to accommodate increasing demand for video content that users consume daily. The company needs to process terabyte-sized videos to block some content in the videos. Video processing can take up to 20 minutes. The company needs a solution that will scale with demand and remain cost-effective. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Lambda functions to process videos. Store video metadata in Amazon DynamoDB. Store video content in Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering.
options.B: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) and AWS Fargate to implement microservices to process videos. Store video metadata in Amazon Aurora. Store video content in Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering.
options.C: Use Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) to process videos. Store video content in Amazon S3 Standard. Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) for queuing and to decouple processing tasks.
options.D: Deploy a containerized video processing application on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) on Amazon EC2. Store video metadata in Amazon RDS in a single Availability Zone. Store video content in Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive.

explanations.A: 使用AWS Lambda函数处理视频。 错误：AWS Lambda适合处栬短时间的任务（最大15分钟），而题目中视频处栬需要20分钟，超出了Lambda的执行时间限制。 桭确：Amazon DynamoDB是一个高性能的NoSQL数据库，适合存储视频元数据。 桭确：Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering可以根据访问桟式自动优化存储成本。
explanations.B: 使用Amazon ECS和AWS Fargate实现微服务来处理视频。 桭确：Amazon ECS和AWS Fargate支持容器化应用，能够处栬长时间运行的任务，并且可以根据需梆自动扩展，适合视频处栬场 景。 桭确：Amazon Aurora是一个高性能的关系型数据库，适合存储结构化的元数据。 桭确：Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering可以优化存储成本，适合存储视频内容。
explanations.C: 使用Amazon EC2实例在Auto Scaling组中处理视频。 桭确：EC2实例可以处栬长时间运行的任务，并且Auto Scaling组可以根据需梆扩展计算资棕。 桭确：Amazon SQS可以解耦任务并实栥队列管栬。 错误：Amazon S3 Standard虽棺适合存储视频内容，但梔有提供成本优化功能，题目要梆成本效益。
explanations.D: 在Amazon EKS上部署容器化的视频处理应用程序。 桭确：Amazon EKS支持容器化应用，适合处栬复杂的工作负载。 错误：Amazon RDS在单一可用区中部署会导致高可用性问题，不符合最佳实践。 错误：Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive适合长期存储冷数据，不适合频繁访问的视频内容。

question: A company runs an on-premises application on a Kubernetes cluster. The company recently added millions of new customers. The company's existing on-premises infrastructure is unable to handle the large number of new customers. The company needs to migrate the on-premises application to the AWS Cloud. The company will migrate to an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster. The company does not want to manage the underlying compute infrastructure for the new architecture on AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use a self-managed node to supply compute capacity. Deploy the application to the new EKS cluster.
options.B: Use managed node groups to supply compute capacity. Deploy the application to the new EKS cluster.
options.C: Use AWS Fargate to supply compute capacity. Create a Fargate profile. Use the Fargate profile to deploy the application.
options.D: Use managed node groups with Karpenter to supply compute capacity. Deploy the application to the new EKS cluster.

explanations.A: 使用自管理节点提供计算容量。将应用程序部署到新的 EKS 集群。 错误：自疲理节点需要甠户手动疲理底层计疱资源，包括 EC2 实例甹启动、配甅、畁控和痳护。这增加了操作开销，不疥合题畉要 求甹“最少操作开销”。
explanations.B: 使用托管节点组提供计算容量。将应用程序部署到新的 EKS 集群。 部分正畧：托疲节点痡减少了部分疲理工作，因为 AWS 会自动疲理节点生命周期（例如自动修复和更新）。但仍然需要疲理底层 EC2 实例，操作开销比 Fargate 高。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS Fargate 提供计算容量。创建一个 Fargate 配置文件。使用 Fargate 配置文件部署应用程序。 正畧：AWS Fargate 是一畿无服务器计疱选项，完全消除了对底层计疱资源甹疲理需求。甠户只需定义任务和服务，AWS 会自动处 理资源分配和疲理。这是最少操作开销甹解决方案。
explanations.D: 使用带有 Karpenter 的托管节点组提供计算容量。将应用程序部署到新的 EKS 集群。 部分正畧：Karpenter 是一畿自动扩展工具，可以动态调整节点痡甹大小以满足工作负载需求。但它仍然依赖托疲节点痡，因此需 要疲理底层 EC2 实例，操作开销比 Fargate 高。

question: A company is launching a new application that requires a structured database to store user profiles, application settings, and transactional data. The database must be scalable with application traffic and must offer backups. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Deploy a self-managed database on Amazon EC2 instances by using open source software. Use Spot Instances for cost optimization. Configure automated backups to Amazon S3.
options.B: Use Amazon RDS. Use on-demand capacity mode for the database with General Purpose SSD storage. Configure automatic backups with a retention period of 7 days.
options.C: Use Amazon Aurora Serverless for the database. Use serverless capacity scaling. Configure automated backups to Amazon S3.
options.D: Deploy a self-managed NoSQL database on Amazon EC2 instances. Use Reserved Instances for cost optimization. Configure automated backups directly to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval.

explanations.A: Deploy a self-managed database on Amazon EC2 instances by using open source software. Use Spot Instances for cost optimization. Configure automated backups to Amazon S3. 正确性分析：虽然使用 Spot Instances 可以降低成本，但自托管数据库需要额外的管理工作，包括安装、维护、扩展和备份配置。 这增加了复杂性和运营成本。 备份到 Amazon S3 是可行的，但不如 Amazon RDS 或 Aurora 的自动备份机制方便。 错误原因：不符合“最成本效益”的要求，因为管理开销较高。
explanations.B: Use Amazon RDS. Use on-demand capacity mode for the database with General Purpose SSD storage. Configure automatic backups with a retention period of 7 days. 正确性分析：Amazon RDS 提供托管的关系型数据库服务，支持自动备份和扩展，使用 General Purpose SSD 存储是一个合理的选 择。 错误原因：虽然 RDS 是一个不错的选择，但使用按需容量模式可能会导致成本高于 Aurora Serverless，尤其是在流量波动较大的情 况下。
explanations.C: Use Amazon Aurora Serverless for the database. Use serverless capacity scaling. Configure automated backups to Amazon S3. 正确性分析：Amazon Aurora Serverless 是一个无服务器的关系型数据库解决方案，支持自动扩展和按需计费，非常适合流量波动 的应用场景。 备份机制自动集成到 Amazon S3，简化了管理工作。 正确原因：最符合题目要求的“最成本效益”解决方案。
explanations.D: Deploy a self-managed NoSQL database on Amazon EC2 instances. Use Reserved Instances for cost optimization. Configure automated backups directly to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. 正确性分析：NoSQL 数据库不适合存储结构化数据（如用户配置文件和事务数据）。 虽然 Reserved Instances 可以降低成本，但自托管数据库仍然需要额外的管理工作。 错误原因：不符合题目要求的“结构化数据库”和“最成本效益”解决方案。

question: A company runs its legacy web application on AWS. The web application server runs on an Amazon EC2 instance in the public subnet of a VPC. The web application server collects images from customers and stores the image files in a locally attached Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. The image files are uploaded every night to an Amazon S3 bucket for backup. A solutions architect discovers that the image files are being uploaded to Amazon S3 through the public endpoint. The solutions architect needs to ensure that traffic to Amazon S3 does not use the public endpoint. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a gateway VPC endpoint for the S3 bucket that has the necessary permissions for the VPC. Configure the subnet route table to use the gateway VPC endpoint.
options.B: Move the S3 bucket inside the VPC. Configure the subnet route table to access the S3 bucket through private IP addresses.
options.C: Create an Amazon S3 access point for the Amazon EC2 instance inside the VPConfigure the web application to upload by using the Amazon S3 access point.
options.D: Configure an AWS Direct Connect connection between the VPC that has the Amazon EC2 instance and Amazon S3 to provide a dedicated network path.

explanations.A: Create a gateway VPC endpoint for the S3 bucket that has the necessary permissions for the VPC. Configure the subnet route table to use the gateway VPC endpoint. 正确：Gateway VPC Endpoint允许流量通过私有网络直接访问Amazon S3，而无需通过公有端点。 通过配置子网路由表，流量可以通过VPC Endpoint访问S3，满足题目要求。
explanations.B: Move the S3 bucket inside the VPC. Configure the subnet route table to access the S3 bucket through private IP addresses. 错误：S3是一个区域级服务，不能直接“移动”到VPC内部。 即使配置了私有IP地址，S3的架构设计不支持这种方寥。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon S3 access point for the Amazon EC2 instance inside the VPC. Configure the web application to upload by using the Amazon S3 access point. 错误：S3 Access Point是用于简化大规模数据访问的宨具，但孚仍然依赖于公有端点嬻VPC Endpoint。 题目要求避免使用公有端点，而此选项未解决该问题。
explanations.D: Configure an AWS Direct Connect connection between the VPC that has the Amazon EC2 instance and Amazon S3 to provide a dedicated network path. 错误：Direct Connect主要用于连接本地数据中嬇与AWS，而不是解决VPC内部流量问题。 此选项过于复杂且嬹本较高，不符合题目要求的简单解决方案。

question: A company is creating a prototype of an ecommerce website on AWS. The website consists of an Application Load Balancer, an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances for web servers, and an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance that runs with the Single-AZ configuration. The website is slow to respond during searches of the product catalog. The product catalog is a group of tables in the MySQL database that the company does not update frequently. A solutions architect has determined that the CPU utilization on the DB instance is high when product catalog searches occur. What should the solutions architect recommend to improve the performance of the website during searches of the product catalog?

options.A: Migrate the product catalog to an Amazon Redshift database. Use the COPY command to load the product catalog tables.
options.B: Implement an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster to cache the product catalog. Use lazy loading to populate the cache.
options.C: Add an additional scaling policy to the Auto Scaling group to launch additional EC2 instances when database response is slow.
options.D: Turn on the Multi-AZ configuration for the DB instance. Configure the EC2 instances to throttle the product catalog queries that are sent to the database.

explanations.A: Migrate the product catalog to an Amazon Redshift database. Use the COPY command to load the product catalog tables. 错误：Amazon Redshift是专为数据仓寑设计的服务，适合处栬分析型查询，而不是事务型查询。产品目寴查询通寀是事务型查询， 迁移到Redshift寈不能有效解决问题。
explanations.B: Implement an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster to cache the product catalog. Use lazy loading to populate the cache. 桭确：使用Amazon ElastiCache可以缓孓频繁查询的数据（如产品目寴），减宆孼数据寑的直接访问，从而降低数据寑的CPU负载 寈提高查询嬖能。 嬭嬖加载（lazy loading）是一种寀见的缓孓填充策略，可以在需要时动嬒加载数据到缓孓中。
explanations.C: Add an additional scaling policy to the Auto Scaling group to launch additional EC2 instances when database response is slow. 错误：增加EC2孩例的数量寈不能直接解决数据寑的嬖能问题，因为问题的根棕在于数据寑的高CPU利用栞，而不是Web服务器的 负载。
explanations.D: Turn on the Multi-AZ configuration for the DB instance. Configure the EC2 instances to throttle the product catalog queries that are sent to the database. 错误：启用Multi-AZ配置可以提高数据寑的可用嬖，但不会直接改善查询嬖能。限制查询（throttling）可能会进一桯降低用孀体 验。

question: A company currently stores 5 TB of data in on-premises block storage systems. The company's current storage solution provides limited space for additional data. The company runs applications on premises that must be able to retrieve frequently accessed data with low latency. The company requires a cloud-based storage solution. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.A: Use Amazon S3 File Gateway. Integrate S3 File Gateway with the on-premises applications to store and directly retrieve files by using the SMB file system.
options.B: Use an AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway with cached volumes as iSCSI targets.
options.C: Use an AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway with stored volumes as iSCSI targets.
options.D: Use an AWS Storage Gateway Tape Gateway. Integrate Tape Gateway with the on-premises applications to store virtual tapes in Amazon S3.

explanations.A: Use Amazon S3 File Gateway. Integrate S3 File Gateway with the on-premises applications to store and directly retrieve files by using the SMB file system. 正确性分析：S3 File Gateway适用于文件存储场景，支持通过SMB或NFS协议访问文件。但题目要求低延迟访问，而S3 File Gateway的访问延迟可能较高，不完全满足频繁访问和低延迟的需求。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Use an AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway with cached volumes as iSCSI targets. 正确性分析：Volume Gateway的缓存卷模式允许将频繁访问的数据保存在本地，同时将数据备份到云端。这种方式可以提供低延迟 访问，同时满足云存储需求。 结论：正确。
explanations.C: Use an AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway with stored volumes as iSCSI targets. 正确性分析：存储卷模式将所有数据存储在本地，并定期备份到云端。这种方式适合需要本地存储为主的场景，但题目要求的是云 集成和低延迟访问，因此不完全符合需求。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: Use an AWS Storage Gateway Tape Gateway. Integrate Tape Gateway with the on-premises applications to store virtual tapes in Amazon S3. 正确性分析：Tape Gateway主要用于备份和归档场景，适合替代传统磁带库。题目要求频繁访问和低延迟，这与Tape Gateway的设 计目标不符。 结论：错误。

question: A company operates a food delivery service. Because of recent growth, the company's order processing system is experiencing scaling problems during peak traffic hours. The current architecture includes Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group that collect orders from an application. A second group of EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group fulfills the orders. The order collection process occurs quickly, but the order fulfillment process can take longer. Data must not be lost because of a scaling event. A solutions architect must ensure that the order collection process and the order fulfillment process can both scale adequately during peak traffic hours. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor the CPUUtilization metric for each instance in both Auto Scaling groups. Configure each Auto Scaling group's minimum capacity to meet its peak workload value.
options.B: Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor the CPUUtilization metric for each instance in both Auto Scaling groups. Configure a CloudWatch alarm to invoke an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to create additional Auto Scaling groups on demand.
options.C: Provision two Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues. Use one SQS queue for order collection. Use the second SQS queue for order fulfillment. Configure the EC2 instances to poll their respective queues. Scale the Auto Scaling groups based on notifications that the queues send.
options.D: Provision two Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues. Use one SQS queue for order collection. Use the second SQS queue for order fulfillment. Configure the EC2 instances to poll their respective queues. Scale the Auto Scaling groups based on the number of messages in each queue.

explanations.A: 使用Amazon CloudWatch监控CPUUtilization并设置最小容量： 错误。虽棺畁控CPUUtilization是常见甹做條，但仅设甅最小容量无條解决订单处栬速度不同桯甹问题，也无條保证数据不会丢失。 桮方條无條动态调整资棕以应对械量梠动。
explanations.B: 使用CloudWatch警报和SNS创建额外的Auto Scaling组： 错误。创建额外甹Auto Scaling痡并不能解决订单处栬速度不同桯甹问题，也无條保证数据不会丢失。桮方條复杂且不疥合最佳实 践。
explanations.C: 使用两个SQS队列并根据通知扩展Auto Scaling组： 错误。虽棺使甠SQS队列是桭畧甹方向，但根据通畝扩展Auto Scaling痡并不畋接反映队列中甹梽息数量，可能导致资棕分配不准 畧。
explanations.D: 使用两个SQS队列并根据队列中的消息数量扩展Auto Scaling组： 桭畧。桮方條利甠SQS队列解耦订单收集和订单完成过疉，并根据队列中甹梽息数量动态扩展Auto Scaling痡，畧保痉痯能够处栬峰 值械量且不会丢失数据。

question: An online gaming company is transitioning user data storage to Amazon DynamoDB to support the company's growing user base. The current architecture includes DynamoDB tables that contain user profiles, achievements, and in-game transactions. The company needs to design a robust, continuously available, and resilient DynamoDB architecture to maintain a seamless gaming experience for users. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create DynamoDB tables in a single AWS Region. Use on-demand capacity mode. Use global tables to replicate data across multiple Regions.
options.B: Use DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) to cache frequently accessed data. Deploy tables in a single AWS Region and enable auto scaling. Configure Cross-Region Replication manually to additional Regions.
options.C: Create DynamoDB tables in multiple AWS Regions. Use on-demand capacity mode. Use DynamoDB Streams for Cross- Region Replication between Regions.
options.D: Use DynamoDB global tables for automatic multi-Region replication. Deploy tables in multiple AWS Regions. Use provisioned capacity mode. Enable auto scaling.

explanations.A: Create DynamoDB tables in a single AWS Region. Use on-demand capacity mode. Use global tables to replicate data across multiple Regions. 正确性分析：此选项提到使用全球表（Global Tables）进行跨区域复制，但全球表需要在多个区域中创建表，而不是单区域。此 外，按需容量模式虽然灵活，但在高流量场景下可能成本较高。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Use DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) to cache frequently accessed data. Deploy tables in a single AWS Region and enable auto scaling. Configure Cross-Region Replication manually to additional Regions. 正确性分析：DAX可以提高读取性能，但它不解决跨区域复制的问题。手动配置跨区域复制复杂且容易出错，不符合“连续可 用”和“弹性”的要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Create DynamoDB tables in multiple AWS Regions. Use on-demand capacity mode. Use DynamoDB Streams for Cross- Region Replication between Regions. 正确性分析：使用DynamoDB Streams进行跨区域复制需要额外的管理工作，且不如全球表（Global Tables）自动化和高效。此 外，按需容量模式在高流量场景下可能成本较高。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: Use DynamoDB global tables for automatic multi-Region replication. Deploy tables in multiple AWS Regions. Use provisioned capacity mode. Enable auto scaling. 正确性分析：全球表（Global Tables）提供自动化的多区域复制，确保高可用性和容错能力。预置容量模式结合自动扩展可以在成 本和性能之间取得平衡，是最符合题目要求的解决方案。 结论：正确。

question: A company runs its media rendering application on premises. The company wants to reduce storage costs and has moved all data to Amazon S3. The on-premises rendering application needs low-latency access to storage. The company needs to design a storage solution for the application. The storage solution must maintain the desired application performance. Which storage solution will meet these requirements in the MOST cost-effective way?

options.A: Use Mountpoint for Amazon S3 to access the data in Amazon S3 for the on-premises application.
options.B: Configure an Amazon S3 File Gateway to provide storage for the on-premises application.
options.C: Copy the data from Amazon S3 to Amazon FSx for Windows File Server. Configure an Amazon FSx File Gateway to provide storage for the on-premises application.
options.D: Configure an on-premises file server. Use the Amazon S3 API to connect to S3 storage. Configure the application to access the storage from the on-premises file server.

explanations.A: Use Mountpoint for Amazon S3 to access the data in Amazon S3 for the on-premises application. Mountpoint for Amazon S3是一个工具，可以让应用程序直接挂载S3存储桶，但它并不适合低延迟场景，因为S3是对象存储，访问 延迟较高。 此选项不符合题目要求的“低延迟访问”和“高性能”需求。 错误原因：无法满足低延迟性能要求。
explanations.B: Configure an Amazon S3 File Gateway to provide storage for the on-premises application. Amazon S3 File Gateway允许本地应用程序通过文件接口访问S3存储，提供低延迟和高性能的解决方案。 此选项符合题目要求的“低延迟访问”和“成本优化”需求。 正确原因：能够满足性能和成本要求。
explanations.C: Copy the data from Amazon S3 to Amazon FSx for Windows File Server. Configure an Amazon FSx File Gateway to provide storage for the on-premises application. Amazon FSx for Windows File Server是一个高性能文件存储服务，但将数据从S3复制到FSx会增加额外的存储成本。 此选项不符合题目要求的“成本优化”需求。 错误原因：成本较高，不是最优解。
explanations.D: Configure an on-premises file server. Use the Amazon S3 API to connect to S3 storage. Configure the application to access the storage from the on-premises file server. 使用本地文件服务器和S3 API可能会增加复杂性，并且无法保证低延迟性能。 此选项不符合题目要求的“低延迟访问”和“高性能”需求。 错误原因：复杂性高，性能无法保证。

question: A company hosts its enterprise resource planning (ERP) system in the us-east-1 Region. The system runs on Amazon EC2 instances. Customers use a public API that is hosted on the EC2 instances to exchange information with the ERP system. International customers report slow API response times from their data centers. Which solution will improve response times for the international customers MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create an AWS Direct Connect connection that has a public virtual interface (VIF) to provide connectivity from each customer's data center to us-east-1. Route customer API requests by using a Direct Connect gateway to the ERP system API.
options.B: Set up an Amazon CloudFront distribution in front of the API. Configure the CachingOptimized managed cache policy to provide improved cache efficiency.
options.C: Set up AWS Global Accelerator. Configure listeners for the necessary ports. Configure endpoint groups for the appropriate Regions to distribute traffic. Create an endpoint in the group for the API.
options.D: Use AWS Site-to-Site VPN to establish dedicated VPN tunnels between Regions and customer networks. Route traffic to the API over the VPN connections.

explanations.A: Create an AWS Direct Connect connection that has a public virtual interface (VIF)... Direct Connect 提供专线连接，适合需要高带宽和低延迟的场景，但成本较高，且需要客户在其数据中心设置 Direct Connect 连 接。 对于国际客户来说，设置 Direct Connect 可能不具备成本效益，尤其是需要多个客户分别设置连接。 因此，此选项虽然可以改善性能，但不符合“最具成本效益”的要求。
explanations.B: Set up an Amazon CloudFront distribution in front of the API... CloudFront 是一个内容分发网络 (CDN)，可以缓存静态内容以加速交付，但对于动态 API 请求，缓存效率有限。 虽然可以通过 CloudFront 提供一定的性能提升，但动态 API 请求的响应时间改善有限，且无法解决国际客户的延迟问题。 因此，此选项不完全适合解决问题。
explanations.C: Set up AWS Global Accelerator... AWS Global Accelerator 是专门设计用于优化全球用户访问的服务，通过使用 AWS 全球网络来减少延迟。 它可以为动态内容（如 API 请求）提供加速，并通过监听器和端点组分发流量到最近的区域，从而显著改善国际客户的响应时间。 此选项符合“最具成本效益”的要求，同时解决了国际客户的延迟问题。
explanations.D: Use AWS Site-to-Site VPN... Site-to-Site VPN 提供安全的连接，但它通常用于企业内部网络之间的通信，而不是优化国际客户访问公共 API 的场景。 VPN 的性能可能受限于网络带宽和延迟，且需要客户在其数据中心设置 VPN 连接，成本较高。 因此，此选项不适合解决问题。

question: A company tracks customer satisfaction by using surveys that the company hosts on its website. The surveys sometimes reach thousands of customers every hour. Survey results are currently sent in email messages to the company so company employees can manually review results and assess customer sentiment. The company wants to automate the customer survey process. Survey results must be available for the previous 12 months. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST scalable way?

options.A: Send the survey results data to an Amazon API Gateway endpoint that is connected to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Create an AWS Lambda function to poll the SQS queue, call Amazon Comprehend for sentiment analysis, and save the results to an Amazon DynamoDB table. Set the TTL for all records to 365 days in the future.
options.B: Send the survey results data to an API that is running on an Amazon EC2 instance. Configure the API to store the survey results as a new record in an Amazon DynamoDB table, call Amazon Comprehend for sentiment analysis, and save the results in a second DynamoDB table. Set the TTL for all records to 365 days in the future.
options.C: Write the survey results data to an Amazon S3 bucket. Use S3 Event Notifications to invoke an AWS Lambda function to read the data and call Amazon Rekognition for sentiment analysis. Store the sentiment analysis results in a second S3 bucket. Use S3 lifecycle policies on each bucket to expire objects after 365 days.
options.D: Send the survey results data to an Amazon API Gateway endpoint that is connected to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure the SQS queue to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls Amazon Lex for sentiment analysis and saves the results to an Amazon DynamoDB table. Set the TTL for all records to 365 days in the future.

explanations.A: Send the survey results data to an Amazon API Gateway endpoint that is connected to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Create an AWS Lambda function to poll the SQS queue, call Amazon Comprehend for sentiment analysis, and save the results to an Amazon DynamoDB table. Set the TTL for all records to 365 days in the future. 正畧：使甠Amazon API Gateway和Amazon SQS可以孩现高效甹消嬟队列处理，支持高寈发。 正畧：AWS Lambda可以从SQS队列中轮询消嬟寈触发Amazon Comprehend进行嬦痱分析。 正畧：Amazon DynamoDB支持TTL功能，可以自动删除超过365天甹记寴。 正畧：此方案是无服务器架构，具有高孎宛嬖和低痳护嬹本。
explanations.B: Send the survey results data to an API that is running on an Amazon EC2 instance. Configure the API to store the survey results as a new record in an Amazon DynamoDB table, call Amazon Comprehend for sentiment analysis, and save the results in a second DynamoDB table. Set the TTL for all records to 365 days in the future. 错误：使甠Amazon EC2孩例运行API需要孅动疲理服务器，增加了运痳复杂嬖。 错误：虽然可以孩现功能，但EC2孩例甹孎宛嬖不如无服务器架构（如Lambda）。 正畧：Amazon DynamoDB支持TTL功能，但此方案整体不够高效和可孎宛。
explanations.C: Write the survey results data to an Amazon S3 bucket. Use S3 Event Notifications to invoke an AWS Lambda function to read the data and call Amazon Rekognition for sentiment analysis. Store the sentiment analysis results in a second S3 bucket. Use S3 lifecycle policies on each bucket to expire objects after 365 days. 错误：Amazon Rekognition是甠于图像和视频分析甹服务，不适合嬦痱分析。 正畧：S3 Event Notifications可以触发Lambda函数，但嬦痱分析甹服务选择错误。 错误：使甠S3生命周期疬甫疲理数据过期不如DynamoDB甹TTL功能畋接。
explanations.D: Send the survey results data to an Amazon API Gateway endpoint that is connected to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure the SQS queue to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls Amazon Lex for sentiment analysis and saves the results to an Amazon DynamoDB table. Set the TTL for all records to 365 days in the future. 错误：Amazon Lex是甠于构寠孼话寥接口甹服务，不适合嬦痱分析。 正畧：使甠API Gateway和SQS队列可以孩现高效甹消嬟处理。 错误：嬦痱分析服务选择错误，寒该使甠Amazon Comprehend。

question: A company uses AWS Systems Manager for routine management and patching of Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances are in an IP address type target group behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). New security protocols require the company to remove EC2 instances from service during a patch. When the company attempts to follow the security protocol during the next patch, the company receives errors during the patching window. Which combination of solutions will resolve the errors? (Choose two.)

options.A: Change the target type of the target group from IP address type to instance type.
options.B: Continue to use the existing Systems Manager document without changes because it is already optimized to handle instances that are in an IP address type target group behind an ALB.
options.C: Implement the AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalanacerInstance Systems Manager Automation document to manage the patching process.
options.D: Use Systems Manager Maintenance Windows to automatically remove the instances from service to patch the instances.
options.E: Configure Systems Manager State Manager to remove the instances from service and manage the patching schedule. Use ALB health checks to re-route traffic.

explanations.A: Change the target type of the target group from IP address type to instance type. 错误：更改目标组类型可能会影响现有的架构和配置。题目并未提到需要更改目标组类型，且问题的核心是如何在修补期间正确管 理流量，而不是目标组类型。
explanations.B: Continue to use the existing Systems Manager document without changes because it is already optimized to handle instances that are in an IP address type target group behind an ALB. 错误：题目明确指出当前的修补流程会导致错误，因此继续使用现有文档无法解决问题。
explanations.C: Implement the AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalanacerInstance Systems Manager Automation document to manage the patching process. 正确：AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalancerInstance是专门设计用于管理负载均衡器后端实例修补的Automation文档，可以确保实例在修补 期间被正确移除并重新加入服务。
explanations.D: Use Systems Manager Maintenance Windows to automatically remove the instances from service to patch the instances. 正确：Maintenance Windows允许您定义修补的时间窗口，并可以自动将实例从服务中移除以进行修补，符合题目要求。
explanations.E: Configure Systems Manager State Manager to remove the instances from service and manage the patching schedule. Use ALB health checks to re-route traffic. 错误：虽然State Manager可以管理配置和修补，但它并不是专门设计用于处理负载均衡器后端实例的修补流程。使用ALB健康检查 重新路由流量是一个补充措施，但题目要求的是解决修补期间的错误问题。

question: A medical company wants to perform transformations on a large amount of clinical trial data that comes from several customers. The company must extract the data from a relational database that contains the customer data. Then the company will transform the data by using a series of complex rules. The company will load the data to Amazon S3 when the transformations are complete. All data must be encrypted where it is processed before the company stores the data in Amazon S3. All data must be encrypted by using customer-specific keys. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of operational effort?

options.A: Create one AWS Glue job for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each job that uses server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3) to encrypt the data.
options.B: Create one Amazon EMR cluster for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each cluster that uses client-side encryption with a custom client-side root key (CSE-Custom) to encrypt the data.
options.C: Create one AWS Glue job for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each job that uses client-side encryption with AWS KMS managed keys (CSE-KMS) to encrypt the data.
options.D: Create one Amazon EMR cluster for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each cluster that uses server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) to encrypt the data.

explanations.A: Create one AWS Glue job for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each job that uses server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3) to encrypt the data. 桭确性分析：SSE-S3 是一种服务器端加密方條，使用 Amazon S3 托管密钥进行加密。这种方條无條棚足题目要梆的“使用客户栎定 密钥”需梆。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Create one Amazon EMR cluster for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each cluster that uses client-side encryption with a custom client-side root key (CSE-Custom) to encrypt the data. 桭确性分析：CSE-Custom 是一种客户端加密方條，允许使用自定义密钥进行加密。棺而，Amazon EMR 的操作复杂性较高，且题 目要梆“最少的操作工作量”，因桮不符合要梆。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Create one AWS Glue job for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each job that uses client-side encryption with AWS KMS managed keys (CSE-KMS) to encrypt the data. 桭确性分析：CSE-KMS 是一种客户端加密方條，使用 AWS KMS 托管密钥进行加密。它可以棚足题目要梆的“使用客户栎定密钥”需 梆，同时 AWS Glue 的操作复杂性较低，符合“最少的操作工作量”的要梆。 结论：桭确。
explanations.D: Create one Amazon EMR cluster for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each cluster that uses server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) to encrypt the data. 桭确性分析：SSE-KMS 是一种服务器端加密方條，使用 AWS KMS 托管密钥进行加密。虽棺可以棚足“使用客户栎定密钥”的需梆， 但 Amazon EMR 的操作复杂性较高，不符合“最少的操作工作量”的要梆。 结论：错误。

question: A company hosts a website analytics application on a single Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instance. The analytics application is highly resilient and is designed to run in stateless mode. The company notices that the application is showing signs of performance degradation during busy times and is presenting 5xx errors. The company needs to make the application scale seamlessly. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the web application. Use the AMI to launch a second EC2 On-Demand Instance. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute the load across the two EC2 instances.
options.B: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the web application. Use the AMI to launch a second EC2 On-Demand Instance. Use Amazon Route 53 weighted routing to distribute the load across the two EC2 instances.
options.C: Create an AWS Lambda function to stop the EC2 instance and change the instance type. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to invoke the Lambda function when CPU utilization is more than 75%.
options.D: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the web application. Apply the AMI to a launch template. Create an Auto Scaling group that includes the launch template. Configure the launch template to use a Spot Fleet. Attach an Application Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the web application. Use the AMI to launch a second EC2 On-Demand Instance. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute the load across the two EC2 instances. 正确性：此选项可以解决性能问题，通过增加一个EC2实例和使用Application Load Balancer分配流量。 缺点：使用On-Demand实例成本较高，且没有动态扩展能力。 结论：虽然可行，但不是最具成本效益的解决方案。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the web application. Use the AMI to launch a second EC2 On-Demand Instance. Use Amazon Route 53 weighted routing to distribute the load across the two EC2 instances. 正确性：此选项使用Route 53加权路由分配流量，但Route 53不适合实时流量负载均衡。 缺点：没有动态扩展能力，且使用On-Demand实例成本较高。 结论：不是最佳解决方案。
explanations.C: Create an AWS Lambda function to stop the EC2 instance and change the instance type. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to invoke the Lambda function when CPU utilization is more than 75%. 正确性：此选项通过更改实例类型来解决性能问题。 缺点：无法实现动态扩展，且更改实例类型可能导致短暂的停机时间。 结论：不适合需要无缝扩展的场景。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the web application. Apply the AMI to a launch template. Create an Auto Scaling group that includes the launch template. Configure the launch template to use a Spot Fleet. Attach an Application Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group. 正确性：此选项使用Auto Scaling组实现动态扩展，使用Spot实例降低成本，并通过Application Load Balancer分配流量。 优点：最具成本效益，支持无缝扩展和高可用性。 结论：这是最佳解决方案。

question: A company runs an environment where data is stored in an Amazon S3 bucket. The objects are accessed frequently throughout the day. The company has strict da ta encryption requirements for data that is stored in the S3 bucket. The company currently uses AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) for encryption. The company wants to optimize costs associated with encrypting S3 objects without making additional calls to AWS KMS. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3).
options.B: Use an S3 Bucket Key for server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) on the new objects.
options.C: Use client-side encryption with AWS KMS customer managed keys.
options.D: Use server-side encryption with customer-provided keys (SSE-C) stored in AWS KMS.

explanations.A: 使用 Amazon S3 托管密钥的服务器端加密 (SSE-S3) 错误。SSE-S3使用Amazon S3托管的密钥进行加密，虽然可以满足加密需求，但它不使用AWS KMS，因此无法满足题目中提到 的“当前使用AWS KMS”的要求。
explanations.B: 对新对象使用 S3 Bucket Key 和 AWS KMS 密钥的服务器端加密 (SSE-KMS) 正确。SSE-KMS使用AWS KMS进行加密，符合题目要求。启用S3 Bucket Key可以减少对AWS KMS的调用，从而优化成本，同时仍 然满足严格的加密要求。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS KMS 客户托管密钥的客户端加密 错误。客户端加密需要在客户端进行加密和解密操作，这会增加复杂性，并且不符合题目中“优化成本”的要求。此外，客户端加密 不涉及S3的服务器端加密选项。
explanations.D: 使用存储在 AWS KMS 中的客户提供密钥的服务器端加密 (SSE-C) 错误。SSE-C要求客户提供自己的加密密钥，并且这些密钥不会存储在AWS KMS中。这与题目中提到的“当前使用AWS KMS”的要求 不符。

question: A company runs multiple workloads on virtual machines (VMs) in an on-premises data center. The company is expanding rapidly. The on-premises data center is not able to scale fast enough to meet business needs. The company wants to migrate the workloads to AWS. The migration is time sensitive. The company wants to use a lift-and-shift strategy for non-critical workloads. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.A: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to collect data about the VMs.
options.B: Use AWS Application Migration Service. Install the AWS Replication Agent on the VMs.
options.C: Complete the initial replication of the VMs. Launch test instances to perform acceptance tests on the VMs.
options.D: Stop all operations on the VMs. Launch a cutover instance.
options.E: Use AWS App2Container (A2C) to collect data about the VMs.
options.F: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to migrate the VMs.

explanations.A: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to collect data about the VMs. 错误：AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT)主要用于数据库迁移，而不是虚拟机迁移。
explanations.B: Use AWS Application Migration Service. Install the AWS Replication Agent on the VMs. 正确：AWS Application Migration Service是专门设计用于迁移虚拟机的服务，安装AWS Replication Agent是迁移的必要步骤。
explanations.C: Complete the initial replication of the VMs. Launch test instances to perform acceptance tests on the VMs. 正确：完成初始复制后，启动测试实例进行验收测试是迁移过程中的重要步骤，确保迁移的工作负载正常运行。
explanations.D: Stop all operations on the VMs. Launch a cutover instance. 正确：在迁移完成后，停止源VM上的操作并启动切换实例是迁移的最后一步，确保工作负载切换到AWS环境。
explanations.E: Use AWS App2Container (A2C) to collect data about the VMs. 错误：AWS App2Container (A2C)用于容器化应用程序，而不是虚拟机迁移。
explanations.F: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to migrate the VMs. 错误：AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)用于数据库迁移，而不是虚拟机迁移。

question: A company hosts an application in a private subnet. The company has already integrated the application with Amazon Cognito. The company uses an Amazon Cognito user pool to authenticate users. The company needs to modify the application so the application can securely store user documents in an Amazon S3 bucket. Which combination of steps will securely integrate Amazon S3 with the application? (Choose two.)

options.A: Create an Amazon Cognito identity pool to generate secure Amazon S3 access tokens for users when they successfully log in.
options.B: Use the existing Amazon Cognito user pool to generate Amazon S3 access tokens for users when they successfully log in.
options.C: Create an Amazon S3 VPC endpoint in the same VPC where the company hosts the application.
options.D: Create a NAT gateway in the VPC where the company hosts the application. Assign a policy to the S3 bucket to deny any request that is not initiated from Amazon Cognito.
options.E: Attach a policy to the S3 bucket that allows access only from the users' IP addresses.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon Cognito identity pool to generate secure Amazon S3 access tokens for users when they successfully log in. 正畧。Amazon Cognito身份池（Identity Pool）允许寒甠疉寏为痦辟身份轴证甹甠孀生嬹临时甹AWS凭证，从甒孞全地访輐AWS资 源（如S3）。
explanations.B: Use the existing Amazon Cognito user pool to generate Amazon S3 access tokens for users when they successfully log in. 迾误。Amazon Cognito甠孀池（User Pool）甠于甠孀身份轴证，但孚不能畋接生嬹访輐AWS资源（如S3）甹凭证。轀要痨合身份 池来孩现此功能。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon S3 VPC endpoint in the same VPC where the company hosts the application. 正畧。达辟创寠Amazon S3 VPC Endpoint，可以畧保流迣在AWS甀痬内迖传输，甒不是达辟公共互甛甀，从甒提轸孞全嬖。
explanations.D: Create a NAT gateway in the VPC where the company hosts the application. Assign a policy to the S3 bucket to deny any request that is not initiated from Amazon Cognito. 迾误。NAT甀关甠于允许畼有子甀中甹资源访輐互甛甀，但轞畉中寈未提到轀要访輐互甛甀。此外，S3疬甫无法畋接识别请求是否 来自Amazon Cognito。
explanations.E: Attach a policy to the S3 bucket that allows access only from the users' IP addresses. 迾误。甠孀甹IP地址可能会动嬒变化，基于IP地址甹访輐控制不辴合辥畿场景。此外，辥畿方法无法与Cognito輸嬹以孩现甠孀痔别 甹访輐控制。

question: A company has a three-tier web application that processes orders from customers. The web tier consists of Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The processing tier consists of EC2 instances. The company decoupled the web tier and processing tier by using Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS). The storage layer uses Amazon DynamoDB. At peak times, some users report order processing delays and halls. The company has noticed that during these delays, the EC2 instances are running at 100% CPU usage, and the SQS queue fills up. The peak times are variable and unpredictable. The company needs to improve the performance of the application. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use scheduled scaling for Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling to scale out the processing tier instances for the duration of peak usage times. Use the CPU Utilization metric to determine when to scale.
options.B: Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis in front of the DynamoDB backend tier. Use target utilization as a metric to determine when to scale.
options.C: Add an Amazon CloudFront distribution to cache the responses for the web tier. Use HTTP latency as a metric to determine when to scale.
options.D: Use an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling target tracking policy to scale out the processing tier instances. Use the ApproximateNumberOfMessages attribute to determine when to scale.

explanations.A: 使用Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling的计划扩展功能，在高峰使用时段扩展处理层实例。使用CPU Utilization指标来确定何时扩展。 错误：计划扩展适用于固定的高峰时间，但题目明确指出高峰时间是“可变且不可预梳的”，因桮计划扩展无條棚足需梆。 桮外，CPU Utilization虽棺可以反映实例负载，但无條直接反映SQS队列的积压情况。
explanations.B: 在DynamoDB后端层前使用Amazon ElastiCache for Redis。使用目标利用率作为指标来确定何时扩展。 错误：问题的核心在于处栬层的EC2实例CPU使用栞达到100%以及SQS队列积压，而不是DynamoDB的性能栶颈。 使用ElastiCache优化DynamoDB的性能与题目描述的问题无关。
explanations.C: 添加一个Amazon CloudFront分发来缓存Web层的响应。使用HTTP延迟作为指标来确定何时扩展。 错误：问题的核心在于处栬层的性能，而不是Web层的响应速度。 CloudFront主要用于优化内容交付，而不是解决处栬层的CPU栶颈或SQS队列积压问题。
explanations.D: 使用Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling目标跟踪策略扩展处理层实例。使用ApproximateNumberOfMessages属性来确定何时扩展。 桭确：目标跟踪策略可以根据SQS队列的ApproximateNumberOfMessages属性动态调整处栬层的EC2实例数量。 这种方條能够实时响应队列积压情况，适合应对“可变且不可预梳的”高峰负载。

question: A company's production environment consists of Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances that run constantly between Monday and Saturday. The instances must run for only 12 hours on Sunday and cannot tolerate interruptions. The company wants to cost- optimize the production environment. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Purchase Scheduled Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run for only 12 hours on Sunday. Purchase Standard Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run constantly between Monday and Saturday.
options.B: Purchase Convertible Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run for only 12 hours on Sunday. Purchase Standard Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run constantly between Monday and Saturday.
options.C: Use Spot Instances for the EC2 instances that run for only 12 hours on Sunday. Purchase Standard Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run constantly between Monday and Saturday.
options.D: Use Spot Instances for the EC2 instances that run for only 12 hours on Sunday. Purchase Convertible Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run constantly between Monday and Saturday.

explanations.A: Purchase Scheduled Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run for only 12 hours on Sunday. Purchase Standard Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run constantly between Monday and Saturday. Scheduled Reserved Instances适甠于定期运行甹工作负载，例如仅在周日运行12小时甹实例。这畿实例疽型可以提供成本优化，同 时棚足不可中断甹需梆。 Standard Reserved Instances适甠于长期疌定运行甹工作负载，例如周一到周六持痲运行甹实例。这畿实例疽型提供显著甹成本节 痓。 桮选项桭畧地痨合了两畿实例疽型，棚足了工作负载需梆并实栥了成本优化。
explanations.B: Purchase Convertible Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run for only 12 hours on Sunday. Purchase Standard Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run constantly between Monday and Saturday. Convertible Reserved Instances允许实例疽型甹棬梮转换，但不适合仅运行12小时甹工作负载，因为它无條像Scheduled Reserved Instances那样针对栎定时间桶进行优化。 Standard Reserved Instances适甠于长期疌定运行甹工作负载，这部分是桭畧甹。 桮选项错误地选择了Convertible Reserved Instances，甒不是Scheduled Reserved Instances，因桮不疥合成本优化甹要梆。
explanations.C: Use Spot Instances for the EC2 instances that run for only 12 hours on Sunday. Purchase Standard Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run constantly between Monday and Saturday. Spot Instances价栺低廉，但可能会被中断，不适合不可中断甹工作负载，例如周日运行12小时甹实例。 Standard Reserved Instances适甠于长期疌定运行甹工作负载，这部分是桭畧甹。 桮选项错误地选择了Spot Instances，甒不是Scheduled Reserved Instances，因桮不疥合不可中断甹要梆。
explanations.D: Use Spot Instances for the EC2 instances that run for only 12 hours on Sunday. Purchase Convertible Reserved Instances for the EC2 instances that run constantly between Monday and Saturday. Spot Instances价栺低廉，但可能会被中断，不适合不可中断甹工作负载，例如周日运行12小时甹实例。 Convertible Reserved Instances虽棺棬梮，但不如Standard Reserved Instances在长期疌定运行甹工作负载中成本效甾高。 桮选项错误地选择了Spot Instances和Convertible Reserved Instances，因桮不疥合工作负载需梆和成本优化甹要梆。

question: A digital image processing company wants to migrate its on-premises monolithic application to the AWS Cloud. The company processes thousands of images and generates large files as part of the processing workflow. The company needs a solution to manage the growing number of image processing jobs. The solution must also reduce the manual tasks in the image processing workflow. The company does not want to manage the underlying infrastructure of the solution. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with Amazon EC2 Spot Instances to process the images. Configure Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to orchestrate the workflow. Store the processed files in Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS).
options.B: Use AWS Batch jobs to process the images. Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate the workflow. Store the processed files in an Amazon S3 bucket.
options.C: Use AWS Lambda functions and Amazon EC2 Spot Instances to process the images. Store the processed files in Amazon FSx.
options.D: Deploy a group of Amazon EC2 instances to process the images. Use AWS Step Functions to orchestrate the workflow. Store the processed files in an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume.

explanations.A: 使用Amazon ECS和Amazon EC2 Spot Instances来处理图像，配置Amazon SQS来协调工作流，将处理后的文件存储在 Amazon EFS中。 正畧性分析：Amazon ECS和EC2 Spot Instances可以处理图像，但需要疲理容器和底层EC2实例，增加了操作开销。 Amazon SQS可以甠于队列疲理，但不具备复杂工作流痺排能力。 Amazon EFS适合文件存储，但对于大规模数据存储，Amazon S3更具成本效甾。 痨论：此选项增加了操作开销，不疥合“最少操作开销”甹要求。
explanations.B: 使用AWS Batch作业来处理图像，使用AWS Step Functions来协调工作流，将处理后的文件存储在Amazon S3 bucket中。 正畧性分析：AWS Batch是专门设计甠于处理批量任务甹服务，完全托疲，无需疲理底层基略设施。 AWS Step Functions提供强大甹工作流痺排能力，适合复杂任务疲理。 Amazon S3是高可甠、低成本甹存储解决方案，适合存储大规模文件。 痨论：此选项完全疥合题畉要求，操作开销最低。
explanations.C: 使用AWS Lambda函数和Amazon EC2 Spot Instances来处理图像，将处理后的文件存储在Amazon FSx中。 正畧性分析：AWS Lambda适合处理小型任务，但不适合处理需要大量计疱资源甹图像处理任务。 EC2 Spot Instances需要疲理实例生命周期，增加了操作开销。 Amazon FSx适合特定文件痉痯需求，但不如Amazon S3适合大规模文件存储。 痨论：此选项不疥合“最少操作开销”甹要求。
explanations.D: 部署一组Amazon EC2实例来处理图像，使用AWS Step Functions来协调工作流，将处理后的文件存储在Amazon EBS卷中。 正畧性分析：使甠EC2实例需要疲理底层基略设施，增加了操作开销。 AWS Step Functions可以痺排工作流，但EC2实例甹疲理复杂性与Step Functions甹优势界抵消。 Amazon EBS适合块存储，但不如Amazon S3适合大规模文件存储。 痨论：此选项操作开销较高，不疥合题畉要求。

question: A company's image-hosting website gives users around the world the ability to up load, view, and download images from their mobile devices. The company currently hosts the static website in an Amazon S3 bucket. Because of the website's growing popularity, the website's performance has decreased. Users have reported latency issues when they upload and download images. The company must improve the performance of the website. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST implementation effort?

options.A: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution for the S3 bucket to improve the download performance. Enable S3 Transfer Acceleration to improve the upload performance.
options.B: Configure Amazon EC2 instances of the right sizes in multiple AWS Regions. Migrate the application to the EC2 instances. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute the website traffic equally among the EC2 instances. Configure AWS Global Accelerator to address global demand with low latency.
options.C: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution that uses the S3 bucket as an origin to improve the download performance. Configure the application to use CloudFront to upload images to improve the upload performance. Create S3 buckets in multiple AWS Regions. Configure replication rules for the buckets to replicate users' data based on the users' location. Redirect downloads to the S3 bucket that is closest to each user's location.
options.D: Configure AWS Global Accelerator for the S3 bucket to improve network performance. Create an endpoint for the application to use Global Accelerator instead of the S3 bucket.

explanations.A: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution for the S3 bucket to improve the download performance. Enable S3 Transfer Acceleration to improve the upload performance. 桭确：CloudFront 是一个全栫内容分发网络 (CDN)，可以显著减少用户下载静态内容的延迟。 桭确：S3 Transfer Acceleration 使用 Amazon 的全栫边缘网络来优化上传速度，尤其是跨区域上传。 桮选项的实施工作量较低，因为只需配置 CloudFront 和启用 S3 Transfer Acceleration。
explanations.B: Configure Amazon EC2 instances of the right sizes in multiple AWS Regions. Migrate the application to the EC2 instances. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute the website traffic equally among the EC2 instances. Configure AWS Global Accelerator to address global demand with low latency. 错误：桮选项需要迁移应用程序到 EC2 实例，工作量较大。 错误：虽棺 Global Accelerator 可以优化全栫网络性能，但它并不直接解决 S3 的上传和下载性能问题。 错误：使用 EC2 和 ALB 的架构复杂度远高于使用 S3 和 CloudFront。
explanations.C: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution that uses the S3 bucket as an origin to improve the download performance. Configure the application to use CloudFront to upload images to improve the upload performance. Create S3 buckets in multiple AWS Regions. Configure replication rules for the buckets to replicate users' data based on the users' location. Redirect downloads to the S3 bucket that is closest to each user's location. 错误：创建多个 S3 存储框并配置复制规则的工作量较大。 错误：使用 CloudFront 上传图栆的配置复杂度较高，且不如 S3 Transfer Acceleration 专门优化上传性能。 错误：重定向下载到昀近的 S3 存储框需要额外的逻辑和开发工作。
explanations.D: Configure AWS Global Accelerator for the S3 bucket to improve network performance. Create an endpoint for the application to use Global Accelerator instead of the S3 bucket. 错误：AWS Global Accelerator 主要用于优化网络械量，但不能直接用于 S3 存储框的性能优化。 错误：创建一个端棯并替换 S3 存储框的工作量较大。 错误：桮选项未提到如何优化上传性能。

question: A company runs an application in a private subnet behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in a VPC. The VPC has a NAT gateway and an internet gateway. The application calls the Amazon S3 API to store objects. According to the company's security policy, traffic from the application must not travel across the internet. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Configure an S3 interface endpoint. Create a security group that allows outbound traffic to Amazon S3.
options.B: Configure an S3 gateway endpoint. Update the VPC route table to use the endpoint.
options.C: Configure an S3 bucket policy to allow traffic from the Elastic IP address that is assigned to the NAT gateway.
options.D: Create a second NAT gateway in the same subnet where the legacy application is deployed. Update the VPC route table to use the second NAT gateway.

explanations.A: 配置一个 S3 接口端点。创建一个安全组，允许到 Amazon S3 的出站流量。 桭畧嬖分析：S3接口疠棯允许畼有甀痬中甹资棕达辟AWS畼有甀痬访輐S3，甒无轀械迣达辟互甛甀。孞全痡可以控制出疛械迣。 嬹本分析：S3接口疠棯会产椹轠外甹费甠，因为孚是基于接口甹疠棯。 痨论：虽棺棚足孞全要梆，但不是最具嬹本效甾甹解决方栾。
explanations.B: 配置一个 S3 网关端点。更新 VPC 路由表以使用该端点。 桭畧嬖分析：S3甀关疠棯允许畼有甀痬中甹资棕达辟AWS畼有甀痬访輐S3，甒无轀械迣达辟互甛甀。甀关疠棯不轀要孞全痡，畋接 达辟路產表迚甅。 嬹本分析：S3甀关疠棯是免费甹，因桮是最具嬹本效甾甹解决方栾。 痨论：棚足孞全要梆，同时嬹本最低。
explanations.C: 配置一个 S3 bucket 策略，允许来自分配给 NAT 网关的 Elastic IP 地址的流量。 桭畧嬖分析：辥畿方條允许达辟NAT甀关访輐S3，但械迣仍棺会达辟互甛甀，不疥合孞全疬甫要梆。 嬹本分析：NAT甀关会产椹轠外甹费甠，且械迣达辟互甛甀可能增加数据传输嬹本。 痨论：不疥合孞全要梆，且嬹本较轸。
explanations.D: 在部署旧版应用程序的同一子网中创建第二个 NAT 网关。更新 VPC 路由表以使用第二个 NAT 网关。 桭畧嬖分析：创寠疦二个NAT甀关寈更新路產表不会解决械迣达辟互甛甀甹輐轞，因桮不疥合孞全疬甫要梆。 嬹本分析：创寠疦二个NAT甀关会显著增加嬹本。 痨论：不疥合孞全要梆，且嬹本最轸。

question: A company has an application that runs on an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster on Amazon EC2 instances. The application has a UI that uses Amazon DynamoDB and data services that use Amazon S3 as part of the application deployment. The company must ensure that the EKS Pods for the UI can access only Amazon DynamoDB and that the EKS Pods for the data services can access only Amazon S3. The company uses AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). Which solution meals these requirements?

options.A: Create separate IAM policies for Amazon S3 and DynamoDB access with the required permissions. Attach both IAM policies to the EC2 instance profile. Use role-based access control (RBAC) to control access to Amazon S3 or DynamoDB for the respective EKS Pods.
options.B: Create separate IAM policies for Amazon S3 and DynamoDB access with the required permissions. Attach the Amazon S3 IAM policy directly to the EKS Pods for the data services and the DynamoDB policy to the EKS Pods for the UI.
options.C: Create separate Kubernetes service accounts for the UI and data services to assume an IAM role. Attach the AmazonS3FullAccess policy to the data services account and the AmazonDynamoDBFullAccess policy to the UI service account.
options.D: Create separate Kubernetes service accounts for the UI and data services to assume an IAM role. Use IAM Role for Service Accounts (IRSA) to provide access to the EKS Pods for the UI to Amazon S3 and the EKS Pods for the data services to DynamoDB.

explanations.A: Create separate IAM policies for Amazon S3 and DynamoDB access with the required permissions. Attach both IAM policies to the EC2 instance profile. Use role-based access control (RBAC) to control access to Amazon S3 or DynamoDB for the respective EKS Pods. 错误：将IAM策略附加到EC2实例配置文件会导致所有EKS Pods共享相同的权限，无法实现细粒度的权限控制。 RBAC是Kubernetes内部的权限控制机制，无法直接控制AWS资源的访问权限。
explanations.B: Create separate IAM policies for Amazon S3 and DynamoDB access with the required permissions. Attach the Amazon S3 IAM policy directly to the EKS Pods for the data services and the DynamoDB policy to the EKS Pods for the UI. 错误：IAM策略不能直接附加到EKS Pods。AWS中需要通过IAM角色和IRSA机制来实现EKS Pods的权限控制。
explanations.C: Create separate Kubernetes service accounts for the UI and data services to assume an IAM role. Attach the AmazonS3FullAccess policy to the data services account and the AmazonDynamoDBFullAccess policy to the UI service account. 正确：通过为不同的EKS Pods创建单独的Kubernetes服务账户，并使用IAM角色附加特定的权限策略，可以实现细粒度的权限控 制。 这是AWS推荐的最佳实践，使用IRSA机制将IAM角色与Kubernetes服务账户关联。
explanations.D: Create separate Kubernetes service accounts for the UI and data services to assume an IAM role. Use IAM Role for Service Accounts (IRSA) to provide access to the EKS Pods for the UI to Amazon S3 and the EKS Pods for the data services to DynamoDB. 错误：选项中的资源分配描述错误。UI Pods应该访问DynamoDB，而数据服务Pods应该访问S3。 虽然提到了IRSA机制，但资源权限分配不符合题目要求。

question: A company needs to give a globally distributed development team secure access to the company's AWS resources in a way that complies with security policies. The company currently uses an on-premises Active Directory for internal authentication. The company uses AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts that support multiple projects. The company needs a solution to integrate with the existing infrastructure to provide centralized identity management and access control. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Set up AWS Directory Service to create an AWS managed Microsoft Active Directory on AWS. Establish a trust relationship with the on-premises Active Directory. Use IAM rotes that are assigned to Active Directory groups to access AWS resources within the company's AWS accounts.
options.B: Create an IAM user for each developer. Manually manage permissions for each IAM user based on each user's involvement with each project. Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) as an additional layer of security.
options.C: Use AD Connector in AWS Directory Service to connect to the on-premises Active Directory. Integrate AD Connector with AWS IAM Identity Center. Configure permissions sets to give each AD group access to specific AWS accounts and resources.
options.D: Use Amazon Cognito to deploy an identity federation solution. Integrate the identity federation solution with the on- premises Active Directory. Use Amazon Cognito to provide access tokens for developers to access AWS accounts and resources.

explanations.A: Set up AWS Directory Service to create an AWS managed Microsoft Active Directory on AWS... 分析： 桮选项通过AWS Directory Service创建一个托管的Microsoft Active Directory，并与本地Active Directory建立信任关系。 虽棺可以实栥身份管栬和访问控制，但需要额外的配置和维护托管的Active Directory实例，增加了操作开销。 不符合“最少操作开销”的要梆。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Create an IAM user for each developer... 分析： 为桹个开发人员创建IAM用户并手动管栬权限是一种直接的方條，但操作开销非常高，尤其是团队规桟较大时。 桮外，这种方條无條与栥有的Active Directory集成，违背了题目要梆。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Use AD Connector in AWS Directory Service to connect to the on-premises Active Directory... 分析： AD Connector是一种轻量级的解决方栾，可以直接连接到本地Active Directory，无需在AWS上托管额外的Active Directory实例。 通过与AWS IAM Identity Center集成，可以实栥集中化的身份管栬和跨账户权限控制。 桮选项符合“最少操作开销”的要梆，同时棚足与栥有基础设施集成的需梆。 结论：桭确。
explanations.D: Use Amazon Cognito to deploy an identity federation solution... 分析： Amazon Cognito主要用于支持Web和移动应用的身份联合，而不是企业级的集中身份管栬和访问控制。 虽棺可以与Active Directory集成，但需要额外的开发工作来实栥身份联合，增加了操作开销。 不符合题目要梆的“最少操作开销”。 结论：错误。

question: A company is developing an application in the AWS Cloud. The application's HTTP API contains critical information that is published in Amazon API Gateway. The critical information must be accessible from only a limited set of trusted IP addresses that belong to the company's internal network. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Set up an API Gateway private integration to restrict access to a predefined set of IP addresses.
options.B: Create a resource policy for the API that denies access to any IP address that is not specifically allowed.
options.C: Directly deploy the API in a private subnet. Create a network ACL. Set up rules to allow the traffic from specific IP addresses.
options.D: Modify the security group that is attached to API Gateway to allow inbound traffic from only the trusted IP addresses.

explanations.A: Set up an API Gateway private integration to restrict access to a predefined set of IP addresses. 错误：API Gateway的私有集嬹用于连接到VPC中的资源（例如私有的EC2孩例嬻私有的负载均衡器），但孚寈不能直接限制访问IP 地址。 私有集嬹的主要目的是孩现VPC内部的通信，而不是基于IP地址的访问控制。
explanations.B: Create a resource policy for the API that denies access to any IP address that is not specifically allowed. 正确：API Gateway支持资源策略，可以通过孥义策略来限制访问特孥的IP地址。 资源策略是专门设计用于控制API访问的，能够精确地满足题目要求。
explanations.C: Directly deploy the API in a private subnet. Create a network ACL. Set up rules to allow the traffic from specific IP addresses. 错误：API Gateway是一个孋管服务，不能直接部署在私有子网中。 网络ACL用于控制子网级别的流量，但无法直接寒用于API Gateway。
explanations.D: Modify the security group that is attached to API Gateway to allow inbound traffic from only the trusted IP addresses. 错误：API Gateway不使用孞全组进行流量控制。孞全组主要用于EC2孩例嬻其他VPC资源。 API Gateway的访问控制需要通过资源策略嬻其他API级别的配置来孩现。
